<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentADV/Groovy/Advantasure_Pulse.txt">
// Importing the ProxyMessage class from the com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy package
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
// Importing the SmartStream class from the com.edifecs.etools.commons.io package
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
// Importing the NodeChild class from the groovy.util.slurpersupport package
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild;
import java.util.ArrayList;
// Importing all classes from the java.io package
import java.io.*;
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
exchProperties.each // Iterate over each property in the 'exchProperties' object
{
k, v-> msgHeaders.put(k, v)  // Add the key-value pair to the 'msgHeaders' object
}
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream(); // Get the body of the 'message' object as a SmartStream and retrieve its InputStream
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream); // Parse the InputStream using XmlSlurper and assign the resulting object to 'root'
StringBuilder errorBuilder = new StringBuilder();// Create a StringBuilder object
// Create a List
List snipListFile;
List snipList;
// Create a StringBuilder to store file-level errors
StringBuilder fileLevelErrors;
def InputFileName;
def EDIfileType;
def UniqueFileID;
def RecordIdentifier;
def FileReceiptDate;
def Statuscode;
def dataReportErrorBrief;
def dataReportErrorMsg;
def dataReportErrorID;
def dataReportSnipCategory;
def dataReporCoverageSnip;
def SubscriberID;
def MemberID;
def MemberFirstName;
def MemberMiddleName;
def MemberLastName;
def SubscriberFirstName;
def SubscriberLastName;
def SubscriberMiddleName;
def MemberDOB;
def GroupID;
def MessageErrorBrief;
def MessageErrorMsg;
def MessageSnipCategory;
def MessageCoverageSnip;
def MessageErrorID;
def planCount;
int dataReportErrorcount = 0;
def EntireDocumentErrorTotal = '';
def RecordCount;
root.each  // Iterate over each DataReportNode in the 'root' object
{
DataReportNode ->
Statuscode = DataReportNode.@StatusCode;
fileLevelErrorIDMap = new HashMap<String, String> ();
snipListFile = new ArrayList();
println("1grouid");
DataReportNode.Fields.Field.each  // Iterate over each Field within  DataReportNode
{
DataReportField ->
fileLevelErrors = new StringBuilder();
String entireDocumentField = DataReportField.@Name;
if (entireDocumentField == "FileName")
{
InputFileName = DataReportField.text();
}
if (entireDocumentField == "XMLFileCreationDate")
{
FileReceiptDate = DataReportField.text();
}
if (entireDocumentField == "planCount")
{
planCount = DataReportField.text();
//println("in"+planCount)
}
//println(planCount)
for (NodeChild error: DataReportNode.Errors.Error)  // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'DataReportNode.Errors'
{
dataReportErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString();
dataReportErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString();
dataReportSnipCategory = error.@Category;
dataReportErrorID = error.@ID;
if (dataReportSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
dataReporCoverageSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!snipListFile.contains(dataReporCoverageSnip))
{
snipListFile.add(dataReporCoverageSnip);
}
dataReportErrorcount = dataReportErrorcount + 1;
String dataReportErrorcounter = Integer.toString(dataReportErrorcount);
fileLevelErrors.append("EntireDocumentError" + "${dataReportErrorcounter}" + " " + "${dataReportErrorBrief}" + "${dataReportErrorMsg}");
def keyValueED = "EntireDocument" + dataReportErrorcounter;
fileLevelErrorIDMap.put(keyValueED, dataReportErrorID);
break;
}
}
DataReportNode.ErrorStatistics.each
{
errorStatistics ->
EntireDocumentErrorTotal = errorStatistics.ErrorTotal.text().toString();
}
root.GroupNode.each // Iterate over each GroupNode in the 'root' object
{
Message ->
int MessageErrorcount = 0;
Message.Fields.Field.each // Iterate over each Field within each Message
{
MessageField ->
String MessageFields = MessageField.@Name;
if (MessageFields == "SubscriberID")
{
SubscriberID = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "SubscriberID")
{
MemberID = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "MemberFirstName")
{
MemberFirstName = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "MemberLastName")
{
MemberLastName = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "MemberMiddleName")
{
MemberMiddleName = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageField == "MemberFirstName")
{
SubscriberFirstName = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "MemberLastName")
{
SubscriberLastName = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageField == "MemberMiddleName")
{
SubscriberMiddleName = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "MemberDOB")
{
MemberDOB = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "GroupID")
{
GroupID = MessageField.text().trim();
}
if (MessageFields == "UniqueFileID")
{
UniqueFileID = MessageField.text();
}
if (MessageFields == "RecordIdentifier")
{
RecordIdentifier = MessageField.text();
}
if (MessageFields == "RecordCount")
{
RecordCount = MessageField.text();
}
}
for (NodeChild error: Message.Errors.Error)   // Iterate over each 'Error' child node within 'Message.Errors'
{
MessageErrorBrief = error.Brief.text().toString();
MessageErrorMsg = error.Msg.text().toString();
MessageSnipCategory = error.@Category;
MessageErrorID = error.@ID;
if (MessageSnipCategory == 'Rejecting')
{
MessageCoverageSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (!snipListFile.contains(MessageCoverageSnip))
{
snipListFile.add(MessageCoverageSnip);
}
MessageErrorcount = MessageErrorcount + 1;
String MessageErrorcounter = Integer.toString(MessageErrorcount);
fileLevelErrors.append("Record Error description " + "${MessageErrorBrief}" +"${MessageErrorMsg}").append(",");
def keyValueMessage = "Message" + MessageErrorcounter;
fileLevelErrorIDMap.put(keyValueMessage, MessageErrorID);
}
break;
}
}
}
}
if(Statuscode == "A" || Statuscode == "P" )
{
def recordIDArray = RecordIdentifier.split("\\|")
for(int i =0;i<recordIDArray.length;i++)
{
// Append values to errorBuilder
errorBuilder.append("Edifecs");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(InputFileName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Daily");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Advantasure");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(UniqueFileID);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(recordIDArray[i]);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberID);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberFirstName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberMiddleName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberLastName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberDOB);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Self");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(GroupID);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Medicare");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(Statuscode);
errorBuilder.append(",");
if (!fileLevelErrorIDMap.isEmpty())
{
for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry: fileLevelErrorIDMap.entrySet())
{// Iterate over each entry in the fileLevelErrorIDMap
String fileLevelErrorIDFromMap = entry.getValue(); // Get the value (fileLevelErrorIDFromMap) from the current entry
if (fileLevelErrorIDMap?.size() == 1) errorBuilder.append(fileLevelErrorIDFromMap);  // Append fileLevelErrorIDFromMap to errorBuilder
}
}
errorBuilder.append(",");
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty())
{
errorBuilder.append(fileLevelErrors.toString());
errorBuilder.append(",");
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append(",").append(",");
}
errorBuilder.append(EntireDocumentErrorTotal).append(',');
//Check for the SNIP erros and append 'Y' if present else append 'N'
if (snipListFile.contains("1"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("2"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("3"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("4"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("5"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("6"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("7"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(FileReceiptDate);
errorBuilder.append("\r\n");
}
}
else if(Statuscode == "R")
{
errorBuilder.append("Edifecs");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(InputFileName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Daily");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Advantasure");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(UniqueFileID);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(RecordCount);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberID);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberFirstName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberMiddleName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberLastName);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(MemberDOB);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Self");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(GroupID);
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append("Medicare");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(Statuscode);
errorBuilder.append(",");
if (!fileLevelErrorIDMap.isEmpty())
{
for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry: fileLevelErrorIDMap.entrySet())
{// Iterate over each entry in the fileLevelErrorIDMap
String fileLevelErrorIDFromMap = entry.getValue(); // Get the value (fileLevelErrorIDFromMap) from the current entry
if (fileLevelErrorIDMap?.size() == 1) errorBuilder.append(fileLevelErrorIDFromMap);  // Append fileLevelErrorIDFromMap to errorBuilder
}
}
errorBuilder.append(",");
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty())
{
errorBuilder.append(fileLevelErrors.toString());
errorBuilder.append(",");
}
else
{
errorBuilder.append(",").append(",");
}
errorBuilder.append(EntireDocumentErrorTotal).append(',');
//Check for the SNIP erros and append 'Y' if present else append 'N'
if (snipListFile.contains("1"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("2"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("3"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("4"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("5"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("6"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
if (snipListFile.contains("7"))
errorBuilder.append("N").append(',');
else
errorBuilder.append("Y").append(',');
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(",");
errorBuilder.append(FileReceiptDate);
errorBuilder.append("\r\n");
}
// Convert the contents of 'errorBuilder' to a string
newMessageBody = errorBuilder.toString();
// Create a new message using 'newMessageBody' and the headers from the original message
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, message.getHeaders());
// Create an exchange response with 'msgHeaders' and 'newMessage'
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage);

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentADV/Groovy/DFF_Audit_Report">
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild;
import java.io.*;
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
//def ValidationAuditStartDateTime='';
//def ValidationAuditEndDateTime='';
def auditEventNumber = exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber')
//if(auditEventNumber =="3")
if (auditEventNumber in ["2", "4"])
{
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream()
def maxFormattedLength = 298;
// Parse XML
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream)
StringBuilder errorDetails = new StringBuilder()
def errors = root.'**'.findAll { it.name() == 'Error' }
// Iterate and format each error (excluding description)
errors.eachWithIndex { error, idx ->
def errorBrief = error.Brief?.text()?.trim()
def errorID = error.@ID?.toString()
def errorCategory = error.@Category?.toString()
def errorSeverity = error.@Severity?.toString()
def errorSnip = error.@SNIP?.toString()
// Nested info inside ErrorDataInfo
def errDataInfo = error.ErrorDataInfo
def businessPath = errDataInfo.BusinessPath?.text()?.trim()
if(businessPath!="")
{
businessPath=": "+"ErrPath-"+"${businessPath}";
}
else{
businessPath="";
}
def errorSegment = errDataInfo.Part1?.text()?.trim()
if(errorSegment !="")
{
errorSegment=": "+"ErrSegment-"+"${errorSegment}";
}
else
{
errorSegment="";
}
def errData = errDataInfo.ErrData?.text()?.trim()
if(errData!=""){
errData=": "+"ErrData-"+"${errData}";
}
else{
errData=="";
}
String formatted = "ErrID-${errorID}${errData}: SNIP-${errorSnip}${businessPath}: ErrBrief-${errorBrief}${errorSegment}"
// Truncate if longer than allowed
if (formatted.length() > maxFormattedLength) {
formatted = formatted.take(maxFormattedLength)
}
formatted = formatted.replaceFirst(/\|$/, "")
// Append with || separator if not first
if (idx > 0) {
errorDetails.append("||")
}
errorDetails.append(formatted)
}
// Add to headers
msgHeaders.put("ExtractedErrors", errorDetails.toString())
// Optional response creation
// ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(errorDetails.toString(), msgHeaders)
// context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
def AdaptorErrorMessage = '';
//println ("beforecondition: " + newMessageBody)
newMessageBody = errorDetails.toString();
//println ("beforecondition: " + newMessageBody)
if (newMessageBody.length() > 5000) {
// Trim the string to 5000 characters and add "(...)" at the end
newMessageBody = newMessageBody.substring(0, 4992) + "(...)"
}
exchProperties['adaptorErrorMessage'] = newMessageBody;
}
exchange = context.exchange
properties = exchange.properties
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages.first()
messageBodyInputStream = message.bodyAsSmartStream.inputStream
InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(messageBodyInputStream)
BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(isr)
def Unique = properties.get('recordId')
def badRecordIdentifier = properties.get('Unique')
//def auditEventNumber = properties.get('auditEventNumber')
def UniqueMemberId = properties.get('recordIdentifierBad')
def ValidationAuditStartDateTime = properties.get('ValidationAuditStartTime')
def ValidationAuditEndDateTime = properties.get('ValidationAuditEndTime')
def ConversionAuditStartDateTime = properties.get('ConversionAuditStartTime')
def ConversionAuditEndDateTime = properties.get('ConversionAuditEndDateTime')
def MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime = properties.get('MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime')
def ValidationErrorAuditEndDateTime = properties.get('ValidationErrorAuditEndDateTime')
// Flag to check if the event has been logged
def alreadyLogged = properties.get("alreadyLogged") ?: false
if (auditEventNumber == "1" && !alreadyLogged) {
properties.put("Unique", Unique)
properties.put("OrigionalValidationStart", "Yes")
// Log PROCESS_START
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ValidationAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
// Log PROCESS_END
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_END")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ValidationAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
// Set the flag to true to prevent duplicate logging
properties.put("alreadyLogged", true)
}
else if (auditEventNumber == "2") {
properties.put("Unique", badRecordIdentifier)
properties.put("OrigionalValidationStart", "Yes")
properties.put("UniqueMemberId", UniqueMemberId)
// Log PROCESS_START and ERROR
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ValidationAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", newMessageBody)
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ValidationErrorAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else if (auditEventNumber == "3") {
properties.put("Unique", Unique)
properties.put("OrigionalValidationStart", "No")
properties.put("ConversionFlag", "Yes")
// Log PROCESS_START
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ConversionAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
// Log PROCESS_END
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_END")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ConversionAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "MESSAGE_PUBLISHED")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
properties.remove("AdaptorStatus")
properties.remove("ProcessStageName")
}
else if (auditEventNumber == "4") {
properties.put("Unique", Unique)
properties.put("ConversionFlag", "Yes")
// Log PROCESS_START
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ConversionAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
// Log ERROR
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", newMessageBody)
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ConversionAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else if (auditEventNumber == "5") {
properties.put("PlanVoidFlag", "Yes")
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ValidationAuditStartDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "Rejected the request since the plan is void")
properties.put("InputRecepitDate",ValidationAuditEndDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
// Clear the alreadyLogged flag if needed for the next execution
if (auditEventNumber != "1") {
properties.remove("alreadyLogged")
}
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentADV/Groovy/DFF_Ordering">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
import java.util.*;
// Access the exchange and message data
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
// Read the input stream content into a string
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream();
String messageContent = new String(messageBodyInputStream.readAllBytes());
exchProperties.each { k, v -> msgHeaders.put(k, v) }
//def inputFilename = exchProperties.get ("")
if (inputFilename.contains("FULLMBROUT")){
exchProperties.put("FileType", "Weekly");}
else if (inputFilename.contains("MBROUT")){
exchProperties.put("FileType", "Daily");}
else if ((!inputFilename.contains("MBROUT")) || (!inputFilename.contains("FULLMBROUT")) ){
exchProperties.put("FileType", "Daily");}
// Split the input data into individual lines
String[] tempLines = messageContent.split("[\\r\\n]+");
// Initialize variables
char CR = (char) 0x0D;
char LF = (char) 0x0A;
// Create a map to hold subscriber IDs and their corresponding lines
Map<String, List<String>> subscriberToLinesMap = new HashMap<>();
// Initialize a set to store unique subscriber IDs
Set<String> uniqueSubscriberIds = new HashSet<>();
// Process each line
for (String tempLine : tempLines) {
String[] parts = tempLine.split("\\|");
if (parts.length >= 2) {
String transactionType = parts[0];
String subscriberID = parts[1];
// Add the subscriber ID to the set
uniqueSubscriberIds.add(subscriberID);
if (!subscriberToLinesMap.containsKey(subscriberID)) {
subscriberToLinesMap.put(subscriberID, new ArrayList<>());
}
if ("DEM".equals(transactionType)) {
subscriberToLinesMap.get(subscriberID).add(0, tempLine);
} else {
subscriberToLinesMap.get(subscriberID).add(tempLine);
}
}
}
// Get the count of unique subscribers
int uniqueSubscriberCount = uniqueSubscriberIds.size();
// Add the count to the properties
exchProperties.put("UniqueSubscriberCount", uniqueSubscriberCount.toString());
// Process each subscriber and create a new message for each
for (String subscriberID : subscriberToLinesMap.keySet()) {
List<String> lines = subscriberToLinesMap.get(subscriberID);
// Generate the final data string using StringBuilder for each subscriber
StringBuilder finalDataStringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
for (String line : lines) {
finalDataStringBuilder.append(line).append(CR).append(LF);
}
String finalDataString = finalDataStringBuilder.toString();
// Create a new message headers map for each subscriber
def newMsgHeaders = [:]
exchProperties.each { k, v -> newMsgHeaders.put(k, v) }
// Add the subscriberID to the new message headers
newMsgHeaders.put("UniqueMemberId", subscriberID);
// Create a new message and send the response for each subscriber
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(finalDataString, newMsgHeaders);
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage);
}
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentADV/Groovy/P_IB_ADV_834_API_Token_Reprocess.txt">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
import java.util.Calendar
import java.util.Date
// Assuming exchange, context, and message headers are already initialized
exchange = context.exchange
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages[0]
msgHeaders = message.headers
// Get the current date and time in the desired format yyyyMMddHHmm
def dateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMddHHmm")
def currentDate = new Date()
def formattedCurrentDate = dateFormat.format(currentDate)
// Get the current time as a Calendar instance
def calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
calendar.setTime(currentDate)
// Subtract 1, 2, and 3 minutes
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)
def oneMinuteBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)  // Subtract another minute
def twoMinutesBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)  // Subtract another minute
def threeMinutesBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
// Create the msgHeaders with the calculated properties
def msgHeaders = [:]
msgHeaders['currentDateTime'] = formattedCurrentDate
msgHeaders['oneMinuteBefore'] = oneMinuteBefore
msgHeaders['twoMinutesBefore'] = twoMinutesBefore
msgHeaders['threeMinutesBefore'] = threeMinutesBefore
// If you don't have an actual message body, you can still send an empty message
def newMessageBody = ""  // No message body content in this case
// Create a new message (you can create an empty message if needed)
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, msgHeaders)
// Send the response with the new message and headers
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentADV/Groovy/Update_Header">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils;
import java.io.*;
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
messageBodyInputStream = message.bodyAsSmartStream.inputStream;
InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(messageBodyInputStream);
BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(isr);
exchProperties.each{ k, v -> msgHeaders.put(k, v) }
String line = "";
StringBuilder dataBuilder = new StringBuilder();
String recordCountString = "<enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord>";
int recordCount = 0;
while((line=br.readLine())!=null)
{
dataBuilder.append(line).append("\r\n");
int recordCountLine = StringUtils.countMatches(line, recordCountString);
recordCount = recordCount+ recordCountLine;
}
String UniqueFileID = msgHeaders.get("DFFFileId");
String EdiFileName = msgHeaders.get("EdiFileName");
String UniqueSubscriberCount = msgHeaders.get("UniqueSubscriberCount");
String inputArchiveFilename = msgHeaders.get("inputArchiveFilename");
String EdiFileType = msgHeaders.get("FileType");
String correlationId = msgHeaders.get("correlationId");
String planCount = msgHeaders.get("planCount");
String XMLFileCreationDate = msgHeaders.get("XMLFileCreationDate");
String TotalEdiTransaction = msgHeaders.get("TotalEdiTransaction");
String TotalMemberCount = msgHeaders.get("TotalMemberCount");
String SenderId = msgHeaders.get("senderId");
String ReceiverId = msgHeaders.get("senderId");
String TotalXmlTransactionCount = msgHeaders.get("TotalXmlTransactionCount");
def finalString = "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>" +
"<enrollmentSparseIBRequestRoot xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\" xmlns:enroll=\"http://www.ust-global.com/schema/enrollmentsparse\" xmlns:base=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/basetypes\" xmlns:stl=\"http://www.codesynthesis.com/xmlns/xsstl\" xmlns:subscription=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/subscriptionsparse\" xmlns:subsidy=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/subsidy\" xmlns:enrollmenttypes=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/enrollmenttypes\" xmlns:payeeBankAccount=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/payeebankaccounts\" xmlns:minput=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/matchinput\" xmlns:membership=\"http://www.ust-global.com/schema/membershipsparse\" xmlns:membershipsparse=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/membershipsparse\" xmlns:hicn=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/medicarehicn\" xmlns:cobpolicy=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/cobpolicy\" xmlns:membercomplianceprogram=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/membercomplianceprogram\" xmlns:memberfactors=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/memberfactors\" xmlns:sparseResp=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/enrollmentsparseresponse\" xmlns:membercare=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/membercarereserve\" xmlns:enrollment=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/enrollmentsparse\">" +
"<header>" +
"<ediFilename>"+EdiFileName+"</ediFilename>"+
"<ediFileId>"+UniqueFileID+"</ediFileId>"+
"<ediFileType>"+EdiFileType+"</ediFileType>"+
"<ediArchiveFileName>"+inputArchiveFilename+"</ediArchiveFileName>"+
"<totalEdiTransaction>"+UniqueSubscriberCount+"</totalEdiTransaction>"+
"<totalMemberCount>"+UniqueSubscriberCount+"</totalMemberCount>"+
"<totalXMLTransactionCount>"+TotalXmlTransactionCount+"</totalXMLTransactionCount>"+
"<XMLfileCreationDate>"+XMLFileCreationDate+"</XMLfileCreationDate>"+
"<correlationId>"+correlationId+"</correlationId>"+
"<senderId>"+SenderId+"</senderId>"+
"<receiverId>"+ReceiverId+"</receiverId>"+
"</header>" +
"<enrollmentSparseIBRequest>" +
"<enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecordList>" +
"<recordCount>"+recordCount+"</recordCount>" +
dataBuilder.toString() +
"</enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecordList>" +
"</enrollmentSparseIBRequest>" +
"</enrollmentSparseIBRequestRoot>";
newMessageBody = finalString.toString();
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, message.getHeaders())
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage);
</file>

output value 2 should be hardcoded  Identification Type</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">655</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">653</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">655</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_2/lvalue">654</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_2/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_2/rvalue">AlternateMemberID</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="655" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1398" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="653" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="654" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="149" N="Date_JS" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Converting the date format CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var partAEffDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(partAEffDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(partAEffDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+partAEffDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+partAEffDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+partAEffDate.substring(6,8));
}
var partAEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(partAEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(partAEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+partAEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+partAEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+partAEndDate.substring(6,8));
}
var partBEffDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
if(partBEffDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(partBEffDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,+partBEffDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+partBEffDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+partBEffDate.substring(6,8));
}
var partBEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
if(partBEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(partBEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,+partBEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+partBEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+partBEndDate.substring(6,8));
}
var parDAEffDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(4);
if(parDAEffDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(parDAEffDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,+parDAEffDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+parDAEffDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+parDAEffDate.substring(6,8));
}
var partDEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(5);
if(partDEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(partDEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,+partDEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+partDEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+partDEndDate.substring(6,8));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="699" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2341" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2343" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2345" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3061" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3062" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="698" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2342" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2344" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2346" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="3063" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="3064" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="155" N="SignatureDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Changing the date format to CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(date!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(date);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+date.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+date.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+date.substring(6,8));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="712" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="711" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="179" N="Status_Code" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Checking the condtion value 1 and 3

populating the group id.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var trxType = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Tr_Type&quot;);
var groupID = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var grpID = groupID.substring(0,6);
if( trxType == 'PLN' || trxType == 'GRP')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,grpID);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="965" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="966" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="224" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Storing the data form using this change variable.

ID="435" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Birth Date
var birthDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(birthDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(birthDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+birthDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+birthDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+birthDate.substring(6,8));
}
//Death Date
var deathDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(deathDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(deathDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+deathDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+deathDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+deathDate.substring(6,8));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2414" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2417" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2415" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2418" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="436" N="Lep_Start_End_Date" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">

if(lepStartDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(lepStartDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+lepStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+lepStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+lepStartDate.substring(6,8));
}
//lepEndDate
var lepEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(lepEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(lepEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+lepEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+lepEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+lepEndDate.substring(6,8));

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2864" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2863" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="536" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Checking th etranscation type is eqaul to PLN
and print the result &quot;result1&quot;,conNo+PBPNo in combination.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var conNo=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Con_No&quot;);
var PBPNo=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PBP_No&quot;);
//var conNo=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value1&quot;);
//var PBPNo=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByName(&quot;value2&quot;);
var Trn_Type=ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Tr_Type&quot;);
if(Trn_Type==&quot;PLN&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByName(&quot;result1&quot;,conNo+PBPNo);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2874" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2875" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2876" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"/><CP ID="2873" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="537" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Storing the data form using this change variable.

N="result3"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="603" N="Date_JS" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Converting the date format CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var dialysisStartDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(dialysisStartDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(dialysisStartDate);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+dialysisStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+dialysisStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+dialysisStartDate.substring(6,8));
var esrdEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(esrdEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(esrdEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+esrdEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdEndDate.substring(6,8));
}
else if(esrdEndDate==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3118" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3119" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3116" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="3117" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="613" N="Date_JS" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Converting the date format CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var transplant=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(transplant!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(transplant);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+transplant.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+transplant.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+transplant.substring(6,8));
var transplant=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(transplant!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(transplant);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+transplant.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+transplant.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+transplant.substring(6,8));
}
else if(transplant==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}
}

var FlgDisabled = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Disabled&quot;);
if(trType == &quot;FLG&quot;)
{
if (FlgDisabled === &quot;Y&quot;) {
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
} else if (FlgDisabled === &quot;N&quot;) {
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;false&quot;);
} else if (FlgDisabled.includes(&quot;Y|N&quot;)) {
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
} else if (FlgDisabled.includes(&quot;N|Y&quot;)) {
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
}
}

ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var PLN_Count_Check = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PLN_Count_Check&quot;);
var splitValues = Racecode.split(',');
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;PLN_Count_Check&quot;+PLN_Count_Check);
var DuplicateCheckValueFound = new Array();
//var seenvalue = new set();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; splitValues.length; i++) {
// currentValue = splitValues[i];
var currentValue = splitValues[i];
var isDuplicate = true;
for (var j = 0; j &lt; DuplicateCheckValueFound.length; j++) {
if(DuplicateCheckValueFound[j] === currentValue ){
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;splitValuesisu=&quot;+splitValues[j]);
isDuplicate = false;
break;
}
//break;
}
if(isDuplicate){
DuplicateCheckValueFound.push(currentValue);
}
}
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;DuplicateCheckValueFound=&quot;+DuplicateCheckValueFound);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,DuplicateCheckValueFound);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3485" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3484" FP="X" P="0" var AuthRep_Address2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
var AuthRep_Address3 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var AuthRep_City = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(4);
//var AuthRep_County = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(5);
var AuthRep_State = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(6);
var AuthRep_ZipCode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(7);
var AuthRep_PhoneNumber = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(8);
var Tr_Type = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Tr_Type&quot;);
var AuthRep_FirstName = &quot;&quot;;
var AuthRep_LastName = &quot;&quot;;
var AuthRep_NameSplit = new Array();
if(Tr_Type == &quot;DEM&quot; &amp;&amp; AuthRep_FirstName_LastName != &quot;&quot;)
{
if(AuthRep_FirstName_LastName.includes(&quot; &quot;))
{
AuthRep_NameSplit = AuthRep_FirstName_LastName.trim().split(&quot; &quot;);
// First name = first element
AuthRep_FirstName = AuthRep_NameSplit[0];
// Last name = everything after the first
AuthRep_LastName = AuthRep_NameSplit.slice(1).join(&quot; &quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, AuthRep_FirstName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, AuthRep_LastName);
}
else
{
AuthRep_FirstName = AuthRep_FirstName_LastName;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, AuthRep_FirstName_LastName);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;TypeOfLegalRepresentative&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, &quot;3&quot;);
if(AuthRep_Address1 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;false&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, AuthRep_Address1);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, AuthRep_Address2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, AuthRep_Address3);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, AuthRep_City);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, AuthRep_County);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, AuthRep_State);
if(AuthRep_ZipCode.length == 9)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, AuthRep_ZipCode.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12, AuthRep_ZipCode.substr(5));
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, AuthRep_ZipCode);
}
}
if(AuthRep_PhoneNumber.length == 10)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13, AuthRep_PhoneNumber.substr(0,3));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14, AuthRep_PhoneNumber.substr(3));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(15, &quot;IndividualPhoneType&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(16, &quot;TE&quot;);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13, AuthRep_PhoneNumber);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(15, &quot;IndividualPhoneType&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(16, &quot;TE&quot;);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3606" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3608" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3610" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3611" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3612" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3613" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"/><CP ID="3614" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3615" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3628" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3607" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="3609" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="3616" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="3617" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="3618" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="3619" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="3620" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="3621" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="3622" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="3623" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/><CP ID="3624" FP="X" P="10" N="result11"/><CP ID="3625" FP="X" P="11" N="result12"/><CP ID="3626" FP="X" P="12" N="result13"/><CP ID="3629" FP="X" P="13" N="result14"/><CP ID="3630" FP="X" P="14" N="result15"/><CP ID="3631" FP="X" P="15" N="result16"/><CP ID="3632" FP="X" P="16" N="result17"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="730" N="Date_JS" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Converting the date format CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var esrdStartDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(esrdStartDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(esrdStartDate);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+esrdStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdStartDate.substring(6,8));
var esrdlEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(esrdlEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(esrdlEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+esrdlEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdlEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdlEndDate.substring(6,8));
}
else if(esrdlEndDate==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}
}

N="Parameters/ec_Script">var institutionalStartDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(institutionalStartDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(institutionalStartDate);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+institutionalStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+institutionalStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+institutionalStartDate.substring(6,8));
var institutionalEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(institutionalEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(institutionalEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+institutionalEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+institutionalEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+institutionalEndDate.substring(6,8));
}
else if(institutionalEndDate==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}
}

var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(medicaidFlag!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(medicaidFlag);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+medicaidFlag.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+medicaidFlag.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+medicaidFlag.substring(6,8));
var medicaidFlag=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(medicaidFlag!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(medicaidFlag);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+medicaidFlag.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+medicaidFlag.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+medicaidFlag.substring(6,8));
}
else if(medicaidFlag==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}

{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+hospiceStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+hospiceStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+hospiceStartDate.substring(6,8));

else if(hospiceEndDate==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}
}

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var TransType = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PCP_Details&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
var resArr1 = new Array();
if (TransType == &quot;PCP&quot;)
{
for(i=0;i&lt;4;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;PCP_Details&quot;, myRS1, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3939" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3940" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3941" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3942" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3938" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="820" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PCP_Details&quot;);
var PLN_StartDate  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PLN_StartDate&quot;);
var Tr_Type  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Tr_Type&quot;);
myRS.last();
var RS = myRS.getRow();
if(Tr_Type == &quot;PLN&quot;)
{
while(RS&gt;0)
{
var Fields = myRS.getFields();
if (PLN_StartDate == Fields[1])
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Fields[1]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,Fields[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Fields[3]);
}
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3946" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3947" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="3943" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="3944" FP="X" P="1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{deea6c3f-99bf-4a64-ac60-9636e3cad646}">Converting the date format CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var LISStartDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(LISStartDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(LISStartDate);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+LISStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+LISStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+LISStartDate.substring(6,8));
var LISEndDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(LISEndDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(LISEndDate);
if(flag == false)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,+LISEndDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+LISEndDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+LISEndDate.substring(6,8));
}
else if(LISEndDate==&quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;3000-01-01&quot;);
}
}
}

var Tr_Type = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Tr_Type&quot;);
if(Tr_Type == &quot;DEM&quot;)
{
if(MemberHomePhone.length == 10)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, MemberHomePhone.substr(0,3));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, MemberHomePhone.substr(3,9));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;IndividualPhoneType&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, &quot;HP&quot;);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, MemberHomePhone);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, &quot;IndividualPhoneType&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;HP&quot;);
}
}	</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="4103" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="4104" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="4105" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="4106" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="4107" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="873" N="AP_Check" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var MemberAltPhone = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Emergency_Contact_Name = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var Tr_Type = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Tr_Type&quot;);
var Emergency_FirstName = &quot;&quot;;
var Emergency_LastName = &quot;&quot;;
var Emergency_NameSplit = new Array();
if(Tr_Type == &quot;DEM&quot; &amp;&amp; Emergency_Contact_Name != &quot;&quot;)
{
if(Emergency_Contact_Name.includes(&quot; &quot;))
{
Emergency_NameSplit = Emergency_Contact_Name.split(&quot; &quot;);
Emergency_FirstName = Emergency_NameSplit[0];
Emergency_LastName = Emergency_NameSplit[1];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Emergency_FirstName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Emergency_LastName);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;responsibilityTypeCode&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, &quot;4&quot;);
}
else
{
Emergency_FirstName = Emergency_Contact_Name;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Emergency_Contact_Name);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="4155" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="4153" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="4154" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="4158" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="4159" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="888" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var esrdStartDate=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var value = /[a-zA-Z!@#$%^&amp;*(),.?\&quot;:{}|&lt;&gt;]/;
if(esrdStartDate!=&quot;&quot;){
var flag = value.test(esrdStartDate);
if(flag == false)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,+esrdStartDate.substring(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdStartDate.substring(4,6)+&quot;-&quot;+esrdStartDate.substring(6,8));

}

if(Tr_Type == &quot;DEM&quot; )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Billing_Adress1);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Billing_Zip_Code);

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentADV/Velocity/P-IB-ADV-834-EnrollmentAuditTemplate">
{
"inputDetails": {
#if($DFFFileId != "" and $DFFFileId != "(N/A)" and $DFFFileId != "{Prp[DFFFileId]}")
"inputId": "${DFFFileId}",
#{else}#end
#if($inputType != "" and $inputType != "(N/A)" and $inputType != "{Prp[inputType]}")
"inputType": "${inputType}",
#{else}#end
#if($UniqueSubscriberCount != "" and $UniqueSubscriberCount != "(N/A)" and $UniqueSubscriberCount != "{Prp[UniqueSubscriberCount]}")
"totalTransactions": "${UniqueSubscriberCount}",
#{else}#end
#if($FileName != "" and $FileName != "(N/A)" and $FileName != "{Prp[FileName]}")
"inputFileName": "${FileName}",
#{else}#end
#if($inputArchiveFilename != "" and $inputArchiveFilename != "(N/A)" and $inputArchiveFilename != "{Prp[inputArchiveFilename]}")
"inputArchiveFilename": "${inputArchiveFilename}"
#{else}#end
},
"process": {
#if($ProcessStageName != "" and $ProcessStageName != "(N/A)" and $ProcessStageName != "{Prp[ProcessStageName]}" and $MessageRead =="Yes")
"processStageName": "${ProcessStageName}",
#{else}#end
#if($ProcessStageName != "" and $ProcessStageName != "(N/A)" and $ProcessStageName != "{Prp[ProcessStageName]}" and $MessageRead =="No")
"processStageName": "${ProcessStageName}",
#{else}#end
#if($adaptorErrorMessage != "" and $adaptorErrorMessage != "(N/A)" and $adaptorErrorMessage != "{Prp[adaptorErrorMessage]}"and $MapErrorFlag == "Yes")
"processMessage": "${adaptorErrorMessage}",
#{else}#end
#if($adaptorErrorMessage != "" and $adaptorErrorMessage != "(N/A)" and $adaptorErrorMessage != "{Prp[adaptorErrorMessage]}"and $PlanVoidFlag == "Yes")
"processMessage": "${adaptorErrorMessage}",
#{else}#end
#if($adaptorErrorMessage != "" and $adaptorErrorMessage != "(N/A)" and $adaptorErrorMessage != "{Prp[adaptorErrorMessage]}"and $ErrorFlag =="No")
"processMessage": "${adaptorErrorMessage}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorStatus != "" and $AdaptorStatus != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorStatus != "{Prp[AdaptorStatus]}" and $MessageRead =="Yes")
"processStatus": "${AdaptorStatus}",
#{else}#end
#if($AdaptorStatus != "" and $AdaptorStatus != "(N/A)" and $AdaptorStatus != "{Prp[AdaptorStatus]}" and $MessageRead =="No")
"processStatus": "${AdaptorStatus}",
#{else}#end
#if($processInputArchiveFilename != "" and $processInputArchiveFilename != "(N/A)" and $processInputArchiveFilename != "{Prp[processInputArchiveFilename]}")
"processInputArchiveFilename": "${FileName}",
#{else}#end
#if($InputRecepitDate != "" and $InputRecepitDate != "(N/A)" and $InputRecepitDate != "{Prp[InputRecepitDate]}")
"auditTime": "${InputRecepitDate}"
#{else}#end
},
"identifiers": {
#if($RayIdentifier != "" and $RayIdentifier != "(N/A)" and $RayIdentifier != "{Prp[RayIdentifier]}")
"rayIdentifier": "${RayIdentifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($record_Identifier != "" and $record_Identifier != "(N/A)" and $record_Identifier != "{Prp[record_Identifier]}")
"recordIdentifier": "${record_Identifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($TenantIdentifier != "" and $TenantIdentifier != "(N/A)" and $TenantIdentifier != "{Prp[TenantIdentifier]}")
"tenantIdentifier": "${TenantIdentifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($sourceTypeIdentifier != "" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "(N/A)" and $sourceTypeIdentifier != "{Prp[sourceTypeIdentifier]}")
"sourceTypeIdentifier": "${sourceTypeIdentifier}",
#{else}#end
#if($record_Identifier != "" and $record_Identifier != "(N/A)" and $record_Identifier != "{Prp[record_Identifier]}")
"recordIdentifierFromSource": "${record_Identifier}"
#{else}#end
},
"membership": {
#if($SubscriberID != "" and $SubscriberID != "(N/A)" and $SubscriberID != "{Prp[SubscriberID]}")
"subscriptionIdentificationNumber": "${SubscriberID}",
#{else}#end
#if($SubscriberID != "" and $SubscriberID != "(N/A)" and $SubscriberID != "{Prp[SubscriberID]}")
"memberIdentifier": "${SubscriberID}",
#{else}#end
"member": {
#if($MemberFirstName != "" and $MemberFirstName != "(N/A)" and $MemberFirstName != "{Prp[MemberFirstName]}")
"firstName": "${MemberFirstName}",
#{else}#end
#if($MemberLastName != "" and $MemberLastName != "(N/A)" and $MemberLastName != "{Prp[MemberLastName]}")
"lastName": "${MemberLastName}",
#{else}#end
#if($MemberDOB != "" and $MemberDOB != "(N/A)" and $MemberDOB != "{Prp[MemberDOB]}")
"dob": "${MemberDOB}",
#{else}#end
#if($Relationship != "" and $Relationship != "(N/A)" and $Relationship != "{Prp[MemberDOB]}")
"relationshipToSubscriber": "${Relationship}"
#{else}#end
}
}
}

//var ref =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
//var value =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var dtp343 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_343&quot;);
var dtp348 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Date_348&quot;);
/*var dateQual=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);*/
var refce = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);
if(refce.length == 16)
{
function addDays(theDate, days)
{
return new Date(theDate.getTime() + days*24*60*60*1000);
//return new Date(theDate + days*24*60*60*1000);
}
if(dtp343 != '' &amp;&amp; dtp343 != '18000101')
{
var YY = dtp343.substring(0,4);
var MM = dtp343.substring(4,6);
var DD = dtp343.substring(6,8);
var newDate = addDays(new Date(YY,MM-1,DD), 35);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(newDate);
var date = (newDate.getDate() &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + newDate.getDate();
var month = newDate.getMonth()+1;
// ec_ResultHelper.println(month);
month = (month &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + month;
var year = newDate.getFullYear();
///ec_ResultHelper.println(year);
//	ec_ResultHelper.println(date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,year+&quot;-&quot;+month+&quot;-&quot;+&quot;01&quot;);
// ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,month+&quot;/&quot;+date+&quot;/&quot;+year);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
/*	ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtpIncrement);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}*/
else if(dtp343 == '')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtp348);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
else if(dtp343 == '18000101')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtp348);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2016" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2017" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2015" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="449" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="459" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="2046" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2047" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="Plan_Year"/><CP ID="2045" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="460" N="DTP_343_JavaScript" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//var ref =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
//var value =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var dtp = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_343&quot;);
var subs = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS01&quot;);
/*var dateQual=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);*/
function addDays(theDate, days)
{
return new Date(theDate.getTime() + days*24*60*60*1000);
}
if(dtp != '' &amp;&amp; dtp!= '18000101' &amp;&amp; subs == &quot;Y&quot;)
{
var YY = dtp.substring(0,4);
var MM = dtp.substring(4,6);
var DD = dtp.substring(6,8);
var newDate = addDays(new Date(YY,MM-1,DD), 1);
var date = (newDate.getDate() &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + newDate.getDate();
var month = newDate.getMonth() + 1;
month = (month &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + month;
var year = newDate.getFullYear();
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,year+month+date);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,month+&quot;/&quot;+date+&quot;/&quot;+year);
// ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Pay Through Date&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
/*	ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtpIncrement);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}*/
else if(subs == &quot;Y&quot; &amp;&amp; dtp == '')
{

else if(subs == &quot;Y&quot; &amp;&amp; dtp == '18000101')
{

N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="474" N="Compliance" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var cDate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var fDate = &quot;20231001&quot;;
var lDate = &quot;20231231&quot;;
var MTC = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(fDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(lDate);
if(MTC == &quot;021&quot;)
{
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;1&quot;);
if((cDate &lt;= lDate &amp;&amp; cDate &gt;= fDate))
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;2024-01-01&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;2025-01-01&quot;)
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2117" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2115" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2116" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="477" N="JavaScript_qualifierList" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var memberSupplimental_Id  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;memberSupplimental_Id&quot;);
var REF_2000_REF02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_2000_REF02&quot;);
var REF_1L_02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_1L_02&quot;);
var INS03  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
var Coverage_REF  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF&quot;);
var Coverage_REF_PriorMonths  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF_PriorMonths&quot;);
var asOfDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate&quot;);
var asOfDate_025 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate_025&quot;);
if(REF_2000_REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;0F&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, REF_2000_REF02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{	//ec_ResultHelper.println(edieligibilityenddate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, asOfDate);
}
}
if(REF_1L_02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;1L&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, REF_1L_02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, asOfDate);
}
}
var array = new Array();
var value = new Array();
if(memberSupplimental_Id != &quot;&quot;)
{
array = memberSupplimental_Id.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;array.length;i++)
{
value = array[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, value[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, value[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
var elementArray = new Array();
var elementValues = new Array();
if(Coverage_REF != &quot;&quot;)
{
elementArray = Coverage_REF.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;elementArray.length;i++)
{
elementValues = elementArray[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, elementValues[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, elementValues[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
var elementArray2 = new Array();
var elementValues2 = new Array();
if(Coverage_REF_PriorMonths != &quot;&quot;)
{
elementArray2 = Coverage_REF_PriorMonths.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;elementArray2.length;i++)
{
elementValues2 = elementArray2[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, elementValues2[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, elementValues2[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2137" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2132" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2133" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2134" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2143" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2144" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="2160" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="2161" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="2162" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="2163" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="2166" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="2167" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/><CP ID="2168" FP="X" P="10" N="result11"/><CP ID="2169" FP="X" P="11" N="result12"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="478" T="Append"><Ps C="S"><P N="separator">-</P><P N="variableID">68</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2138" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="480" N="MSQ_Concatenate" T="Concatenate"><Ps C="S"><P N="separator">,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2140" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2142" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2141" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="487" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">36</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2155" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="491" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">70</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2159" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="498" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refce = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);

ID="2227" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="508" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refce = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(refce);
if(refce.length == 16)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Medical&quot;);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Ancillary&quot;);
//ec_ECGlobal.SetGlobalProp(&quot;dns.fnm.Transaction.prp.Ancillary&quot;);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2234" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2231" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2232" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="509" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,GD,QD,EI,J6,EXS</P><P N="out">,GD,QD,2,5,9</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2244" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2245" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="512" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">2252</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">2251</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">true</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2252" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2251" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="513" N="Compliance_Date" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var cDate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var MTC = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
var hiosID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);
var YY = cDate.substring(0,4);
var MM = cDate.substring(4,6);
var DD = cDate.substring(6,8);
if(MTC == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; hiosID.length == 16){
if(MM &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; MM &lt;= 12) // quarter checking
{
startDate = Number(YY) + 1;
endDate = Number(YY) + 2;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,startDate+&quot;-&quot;+ &quot;01&quot; +&quot;-&quot;+&quot;01&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,endDate+ &quot;-&quot;+ &quot;01&quot; +&quot;-&quot;+&quot;01&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,&quot;MERGE&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;C&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;Fourth Quarter Carryover Eligible&quot;);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2258" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2256" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2257" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2287" FP="X" var INS03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
var benefit_endDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP03_349&quot;);
var APTC_Sub = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var SubscriberId = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SubscriberId&quot;);
var APTC_StartDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;APTC_StartDate&quot;);
var APTC_AMT = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;APTC_AMT&quot;);
if(APTC_Sub==&quot;APTC AMT&quot;)
{
var DTP02_2750 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
var DTP03_2750 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;PREM&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,&quot;MERGE&quot;);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
var year1 = benefit_endDate.substring(0,4);
var month1 = benefit_endDate.substring(4,6);
var date1 = benefit_endDate.substring(6,8);
var format_benefit_endDate = year1+'-'+month1+'-'+date1;
if(DTP02_2750 == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var endate = DTP03_2750.substring(DTP03_2750.length -8); //DTP03_2750 = 20240131-20240201, endate=20240201
var year2 = endate.substring(0,4);
var month2 = endate.substring(4,6);
var date2 = endate.substring(6,8);
var format_enddate = year2+'-'+month2+'-'+date2
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,format_enddate);
}
else
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,format_benefit_endDate);
}
else if(INS03==&quot;001&quot;||INS03==&quot;021&quot;||INS03==&quot;025&quot;||INS03==&quot;030&quot;)
{
if(DTP02_2750 == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var endate = DTP03_2750.substring(DTP03_2750.length -8); //DTP03_2750 = 20240131-20240201, endate=20240201
var year2 = endate.substring(0,4);
var month2 = endate.substring(4,6);
var date2 = endate.substring(6,8);
var format_enddate = year2+'-'+month2+'-'+date2
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,format_enddate);
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,APTC_StartDate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,APTC_AMT);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2721" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2722" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2723" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2711" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2712" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2713" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2714" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="2715" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="2716" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="2717" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="2718" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="2719" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="2720" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="617" N="JavaScript_MaintenanceReasonCode" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var maintenanceReasonCode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2811" FP="A" P="0" N="DTP01"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2812" FP="A" P="1" N="DTP03"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2810" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="638" N="JavaScript_asOfDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
myRS.last();// Move the cursor to the last record in the recordset
var RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row of the recordset
var earliestStartDate_025=&quot;&quot;;
var earliestStartDate = &quot;&quot;;
var earliestEndDate = &quot;&quot;;
var asofdate_check = &quot;&quot;;
ec_ResultHelper.println(earliestStartDate);
// The code enters a while loop and continues as long as the value of RS1 is greater than 0.
var dtp_2000_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_356&quot;);
var dtp_2000_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_357&quot;);
var dtp_2000_303 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_303&quot;);
var HD01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HD01&quot;);
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Retrieve the fields of the current row in the recordset using myRS.getFields()earliestStartDate
var currentDate = new Date(Fields[1].substr(0,4),Fields[1].substr(4,2)-1,Fields[1].substr(6,2));
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;CurrentDate&quot;+currentDate);
if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate)
{
earliestStartDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;349&quot;)
{
if(earliestEndDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestEndDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestEndDate)
{
earliestEndDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;349&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 357 &quot;+ dtp_2000_357);
if(dtp_2000_357 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check ==&quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check=dtp_2000_357
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate_025 == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate_025=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate_025)
{
earliestStartDate_025 = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestEndDate);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();// Move the cursor to the previous row in the result set
RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row from the result set and assign it to the RS1 variable
}
if(HD01 == &quot;001&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 303 &quot;+ dtp_2000_303);
if(dtp_2000_303 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check = dtp_2000_303;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestStartDate);
}
}
if(earliestStartDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate=earliestStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestStartDate);
}
if(earliestEndDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestEndDate=earliestEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestEndDate);
}
if(earliestStartDate_025!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate_025=earliestStartDate_025.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, formattedEarliestStartDate_025);
}

if(Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.length == 8)
{

}
else if(Plan_EligBeginDate_356 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligBeginDate_356.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(6,2));
}
//Plan End Date
// Plan End Date
var Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitEndDate_349&quot;);
var Plan_EligEndDate_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_EligEndDate_357&quot;);
var endDate = &quot;&quot;; // Initialize an empty variable for the end date
if (Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6, 2);
} else if (Plan_EligEndDate_357 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligEndDate_357.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(6, 2);
} else {
// Default to 1/1/3000 if neither date is available
endDate = '3000-01-01';
}
// Report the end date (this will either be the formatted date or the default)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, endDate);
