N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3007" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="702" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="3015" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3016" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="IndividualPhoneType"/><CP ID="3014" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="703" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var code = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
// Extract substrings based on character positions
var date1 = code.substring(0, 3);  // First 3 characters (XXX)
var date2 = code.substring(3, 5);  // Characters at positions 4 and 5 (XX)
var date3 = code.substring(5); // Last 4 characters (XXXX)
// Combine and report
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3019" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3020" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="706" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="3031" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3032" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="ImmigrationStatus"/><CP ID="3030" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="707" N="JavaScript-Input LUI 1" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;, myRS, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3037" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3038" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3036" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="708" N="JavaScript-Input LUI 2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;, myRS1, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3040" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3041" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3039" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="714" N="JavaScript-Output_LUI" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve recordsets
var myRS  = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '7'
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '6'
var myRS2=  ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;); // contains the fields no language indicators
var Fields = myRS.getFields();   // retrive fields of RecordSet RS
var Fields1 = myRS1.getFields(); // retrive fields of RecordSet RS1
// Checks whether identification codes are the same
if (Fields[0] == Fields1[0])
{
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;compare&quot;);
if (Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot; || Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6 or 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields[0]);
}
}
//checks whether identification codes are different
else if	(Fields[0] != Fields1[0])
{
if(Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
if(Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
}
else if	(Fields[1]==&quot;7&quot;) // if only language indicator 7 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
else if	(Fields1[1]==&quot;6&quot;) // if only language indiactor 6 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
myRS2.last();                      // go to last row
var Row = myRS2.getRow();
var reportedCodes = {};            // acts like a Set
while (Row &gt; 0)
{
var Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
var code = Fields2[0];
if (
code != Fields[0] &amp;&amp;
code != Fields1[0] &amp;&amp;
!reportedCodes[code]        // block ALL duplicates
)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, code);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
reportedCodes[code] = true; // mark as reported
}
myRS2.previous();
Row = myRS2.getRow();
}
// clear all the recordsets
myRS.clear();
myRS1.clear();
myRS2.clear();
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3074" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3075" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="3064" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="3065" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="3066" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="3067" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="3068" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="3069" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="3070" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="3071" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="3072" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="3073" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/><CP ID="3085" FP="X" P="10" N="result11"/><CP ID="3086" FP="X" P="11" N="result12"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="715" N="JavaScript Input No Language Indicator" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}

//var ref =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
//var value =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var dtp343 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_343&quot;);
var dtp348 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Date_348&quot;);
/*var dateQual=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);*/
var refce = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);
if(refce.length == 16)
{
function addDays(theDate, days)
{
return new Date(theDate.getTime() + days*24*60*60*1000);
//return new Date(theDate + days*24*60*60*1000);
}
if(dtp343 != '' &amp;&amp; dtp343 != '18000101')
{
var YY = dtp343.substring(0,4);
var MM = dtp343.substring(4,6);
var DD = dtp343.substring(6,8);
var newDate = addDays(new Date(YY,MM-1,DD), 35);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(newDate);
var date = (newDate.getDate() &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + newDate.getDate();
var month = newDate.getMonth()+1;
// ec_ResultHelper.println(month);
month = (month &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + month;
var year = newDate.getFullYear();
///ec_ResultHelper.println(year);
//	ec_ResultHelper.println(date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,year+&quot;-&quot;+month+&quot;-&quot;+&quot;01&quot;);
// ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,month+&quot;/&quot;+date+&quot;/&quot;+year);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
/*	ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtpIncrement);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}*/
else if(dtp343 == '')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtp348);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
else if(dtp343 == '18000101')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtp348);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2016" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2017" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2015" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="449" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="460" N="DTP_343_JavaScript" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//var ref =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
//var value =ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var dtp = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_343&quot;);
var subs = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS01&quot;);
/*var dateQual=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date=ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);*/
function addDays(theDate, days)
{
return new Date(theDate.getTime() + days*24*60*60*1000);
}
if(dtp != '' &amp;&amp; dtp!= '18000101' &amp;&amp; subs == &quot;Y&quot;)
{
var YY = dtp.substring(0,4);
var MM = dtp.substring(4,6);
var DD = dtp.substring(6,8);
var newDate = addDays(new Date(YY,MM-1,DD), 1);
var date = (newDate.getDate() &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + newDate.getDate();
var month = newDate.getMonth() + 1;
month = (month &lt; 10 ? '0' : '') + month;
var year = newDate.getFullYear();
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,year+month+date);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,month+&quot;/&quot;+date+&quot;/&quot;+year);
// ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Pay Through Date&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
/*	ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,dtpIncrement);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}*/
else if(subs == &quot;Y&quot; &amp;&amp; dtp == '')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;18000101&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Pay Through Date&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}
else if(subs == &quot;Y&quot; &amp;&amp; dtp == '18000101')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;18000101&quot;);
//OLD ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Pay Through Date&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;Premium Paid To Date&quot;);
}

N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="474" N="Compliance" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var cDate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var fDate = &quot;20231001&quot;;
var lDate = &quot;20231231&quot;;
var MTC = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(fDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(lDate);
if(MTC == &quot;021&quot;)
{
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;1&quot;);
if((cDate &lt;= lDate &amp;&amp; cDate &gt;= fDate))
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;2024-01-01&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;2025-01-01&quot;)
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2117" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2115" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2116" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="477" N="JavaScript_qualifierList" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var memberSupplimental_Id  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;memberSupplimental_Id&quot;);
var REF_2000_REF02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_2000_REF02&quot;);
var REF_1L_02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_1L_02&quot;);
var INS03  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
var Coverage_REF  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF&quot;);
var Coverage_REF_PriorMonths  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF_PriorMonths&quot;);
var asOfDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate&quot;);
var asOfDate_025 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate_025&quot;);
if(REF_2000_REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;0F&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, REF_2000_REF02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{	//ec_ResultHelper.println(edieligibilityenddate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, asOfDate);
}
}
if(REF_1L_02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;1L&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, REF_1L_02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, asOfDate);
}
}
var array = new Array();
var value = new Array();
if(memberSupplimental_Id != &quot;&quot;)
{
array = memberSupplimental_Id.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;array.length;i++)
{
value = array[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, value[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, value[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
var elementArray = new Array();
var elementValues = new Array();
if(Coverage_REF != &quot;&quot;)
{
elementArray = Coverage_REF.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;elementArray.length;i++)
{
elementValues = elementArray[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, elementValues[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, elementValues[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
var elementArray2 = new Array();
var elementValues2 = new Array();
if(Coverage_REF_PriorMonths != &quot;&quot;)
{
elementArray2 = Coverage_REF_PriorMonths.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;elementArray2.length;i++)
{
elementValues2 = elementArray2[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, elementValues2[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, elementValues2[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2137" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2132" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2133" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2134" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2143" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2144" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="2160" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="2161" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="2162" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="2163" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="2166" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="2167" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/><CP ID="2168" FP="X" P="10" N="result11"/><CP ID="2169" FP="X" P="11" N="result12"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="478" T="Append"><Ps C="S"><P N="separator">-</P><P N="variableID">68</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2138" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="480" N="MSQ_Concatenate" T="Concatenate"><Ps C="S"><P N="separator">,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2140" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2142" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2141" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="487" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">36</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2155" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="491" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">70</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2159" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="498" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refce = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);

var MTC = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
var hiosID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_CE_Value&quot;);
var YY = cDate.substring(0,4);
var MM = cDate.substring(4,6);
var DD = cDate.substring(6,8);
if(MTC == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; hiosID.length == 16){
if(MM &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; MM &lt;= 12) // quarter checking
{
startDate = Number(YY) + 1;
endDate = Number(YY) + 2;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,startDate+&quot;-&quot;+ &quot;01&quot; +&quot;-&quot;+&quot;01&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,endDate+ &quot;-&quot;+ &quot;01&quot; +&quot;-&quot;+&quot;01&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,&quot;MERGE&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;C&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;Fourth Quarter Carryover Eligible&quot;);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2258" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2256" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2257" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2287" FP="X" N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2681" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2682" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="616" N="JavaScript_Subsidy" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var INS03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
var benefit_endDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP03_349&quot;);
var APTC_Sub = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var SubscriberId = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SubscriberId&quot;);
var APTC_StartDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;APTC_StartDate&quot;);
var APTC_AMT = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;APTC_AMT&quot;);
if(APTC_Sub==&quot;APTC AMT&quot;)
{
var DTP02_2750 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
var DTP03_2750 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,SubscriberId);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;99-9999991&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,&quot;BenefitPlanType&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,&quot;1&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;BillingCategory&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;PREM&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,&quot;MERGE&quot;);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
var year1 = benefit_endDate.substring(0,4);
var month1 = benefit_endDate.substring(4,6);
var date1 = benefit_endDate.substring(6,8);
var format_benefit_endDate = year1+'-'+month1+'-'+date1;
if(DTP02_2750 == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var endate = DTP03_2750.substring(DTP03_2750.length -8); //DTP03_2750 = 20240131-20240201, endate=20240201
var year2 = endate.substring(0,4);
var month2 = endate.substring(4,6);
var date2 = endate.substring(6,8);
var format_enddate = year2+'-'+month2+'-'+date2
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,format_enddate);
}
else
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,format_benefit_endDate);
}
else if(INS03==&quot;001&quot;||INS03==&quot;021&quot;||INS03==&quot;025&quot;||INS03==&quot;030&quot;)
{
if(DTP02_2750 == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var endate = DTP03_2750.substring(DTP03_2750.length -8); //DTP03_2750 = 20240131-20240201, endate=20240201
var year2 = endate.substring(0,4);
var month2 = endate.substring(4,6);
var date2 = endate.substring(6,8);
var format_enddate = year2+'-'+month2+'-'+date2
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,format_enddate);
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,APTC_StartDate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,APTC_AMT);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2721" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2722" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2723" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2711" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2712" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2713" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2714" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="2715" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="2716" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="2717" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="2718" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="2719" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="2720" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="617" N="JavaScript_MaintenanceReasonCode" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var maintenanceReasonCode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if(maintenanceReasonCode==&quot;01&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;1&quot;);
else if(maintenanceReasonCode==&quot;03&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;3&quot;);
else if(maintenanceReasonCode==&quot;07&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;7&quot;);
else
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,maintenanceReasonCode);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2747" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2748" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="618" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="2750" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue=":"/><CP ID="2749" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="620" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="2766" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2764" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="EDIFECS_Inbound834_daily"/><CP ID="2763" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="625" N="Qualifier_Value_Concatenate" T="Concatenate"><Ps C="S"><P N="separator">,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2781" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2782" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2780" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="626" T="Append"><Ps C="S"><P N="separator">-</P><P N="variableID">84</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2783" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="627" N="Reset Variables" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Coverage_REF = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
var Coverage_REF_PriorMonths = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF_PriorMonths&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Coverage_REF_PriorMonths&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
var INS04_MRC = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS04_MRC&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;INS04_MRC&quot;,&quot;&quot;);

//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2811" FP="A" P="0" N="DTP01"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2812" FP="A" P="1" N="DTP03"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2810" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="638" N="JavaScript_asOfDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
myRS.last();// Move the cursor to the last record in the recordset
var RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row of the recordset
var earliestStartDate_025=&quot;&quot;;
var earliestStartDate = &quot;&quot;;
var earliestEndDate = &quot;&quot;;
var asofdate_check = &quot;&quot;;
ec_ResultHelper.println(earliestStartDate);
// The code enters a while loop and continues as long as the value of RS1 is greater than 0.
var dtp_2000_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_356&quot;);
var dtp_2000_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_357&quot;);
var dtp_2000_303 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_303&quot;);
var HD01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HD01&quot;);
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Retrieve the fields of the current row in the recordset using myRS.getFields()earliestStartDate
var currentDate = new Date(Fields[1].substr(0,4),Fields[1].substr(4,2)-1,Fields[1].substr(6,2));
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;CurrentDate&quot;+currentDate);
if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate)
{
earliestStartDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;349&quot;)
{
if(earliestEndDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestEndDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestEndDate)
{
earliestEndDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;349&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 357 &quot;+ dtp_2000_357);
if(dtp_2000_357 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check ==&quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check=dtp_2000_357
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate_025 == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate_025=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate_025)
{
earliestStartDate_025 = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestEndDate);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();// Move the cursor to the previous row in the result set
RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row from the result set and assign it to the RS1 variable
}
if(HD01 == &quot;001&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 303 &quot;+ dtp_2000_303);
if(dtp_2000_303 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check = dtp_2000_303;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestStartDate);
}
}
if(earliestStartDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate=earliestStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestStartDate);
}
if(earliestEndDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestEndDate=earliestEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestEndDate);
}
if(earliestStartDate_025!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate_025=earliestStartDate_025.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, formattedEarliestStartDate_025);

{

}
else if(Plan_EligBeginDate_356 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligBeginDate_356.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(6,2));

var endDate = &quot;&quot;; // Initialize an empty variable for the end date
if (Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6, 2);
} else if (Plan_EligEndDate_357 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligEndDate_357.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(6, 2);
} else {
// Default to 1/1/3000 if neither date is available
endDate = '3000-01-01';
}
// Report the end date (this will either be the formatted date or the default)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, endDate);

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/Groovy/IB_834_API_Token_Reprocess.groovy">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
import java.util.Calendar
import java.util.Date
// Assuming exchange, context, and message headers are already initialized
exchange = context.exchange
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages[0]
msgHeaders = message.headers
// Get the current date and time in the desired format yyyyMMddHHmm
def dateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMddHHmm")
def currentDate = new Date()
def formattedCurrentDate = dateFormat.format(currentDate)
// Get the current time as a Calendar instance
def calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
calendar.setTime(currentDate)
// Subtract 1, 2, and 3 minutes
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)
def oneMinuteBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)  // Subtract another minute
def twoMinutesBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -1)  // Subtract another minute
def threeMinutesBefore = dateFormat.format(calendar.time)
// Create the msgHeaders with the calculated properties
def msgHeaders = [:]
msgHeaders['currentDateTime'] = formattedCurrentDate
msgHeaders['oneMinuteBefore'] = oneMinuteBefore
msgHeaders['twoMinutesBefore'] = twoMinutesBefore
msgHeaders['threeMinutesBefore'] = threeMinutesBefore
// If you don't have an actual message body, you can still send an empty message
def newMessageBody = ""  // No message body content in this case
// Create a new message (you can create an empty message if needed)
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, msgHeaders)
// Send the response with the new message and headers
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/Groovy/P-IB-834-RecordIdentifier.groovy">
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
exchange = context.exchange
properties = exchange.properties
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages.first()
messageBodyAsString = message.bodyAsString
def RecordIdentifier = properties.get('RecordIdentifier')
def RecordIdentifierAudit = properties.get('RecordIdentifier')
def auditEventNumber = properties.get('auditEventNumber')
def recordIdentifiers = []
def recordIdentifierAudit = [] // List to store RecordIdentifiers
def stValues = []
String line = ""
def stValue = ""
int INSCount = 0
// Process based on auditEventNumber
if (auditEventNumber == "1") {
def reader = new BufferedReader(new StringReader(messageBodyAsString))
while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {
if (line.startsWith("ST*834*")) {
// Move the initialization here to avoid resetting stValues
stValues = line.split("\\*", -1)
INSCount = 0
}
if (line.startsWith("INS*Y*") || line.startsWith("INS*N*")) {
INSCount++
if (INSCount == 1) {
recordIdentifiers << RecordIdentifier + (stValues[2] != null ? stValues[2] : "")
} else {
recordIdentifiers << RecordIdentifier + (stValues[2] != null ? stValues[2] + (INSCount - 1) + "-" : "")
}
}
}
} else if (auditEventNumber == "2") {
String inputMessage = messageBodyAsString
String findStr = "INS*"
int memberCount = StringUtils.countMatches(inputMessage, findStr)
for (int i = 0; i < memberCount; i++) {
INSCount++
if (INSCount == 1) {
recordIdentifierAudit << RecordIdentifierAudit
} else {
recordIdentifierAudit << RecordIdentifierAudit + (INSCount - 1) + "-"
}
}
} else if (auditEventNumber == "3") {
def recordIdentifierXmlSplit = RecordIdentifier != null ? RecordIdentifier.split(",") : []
int recordIdentifierXmlSplitlen = recordIdentifierXmlSplit.length
for (int i = 0; i < recordIdentifierXmlSplitlen; i++) {
if (recordIdentifierXmlSplit[i] != null) {
recordIdentifiers << recordIdentifierXmlSplit[i]
}
}
}
// Create a single exchange response outside the loops
properties.put("RecordIdentifiers", recordIdentifiers.join(','))
properties.put("RecordIdentifierAudits", recordIdentifierAudit.join(',')) // Join the list into a comma-separated string
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, new ByteArrayInputStream(messageBodyAsString.bytes))
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/Groovy/P_IB_834_AuditErrorCapture.groovy">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild;
import java.io.*;
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
import java.time.LocalDateTime
import java.time.Duration
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
import java.util.Date
import java.time.ZoneId
import java.time.ZonedDateTime
import java.time.temporal.ChronoField
import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
//def ValidationAuditStartDateTime='';
//def ValidationAuditEndDateTime='';
def SeCountErrorCheck = exchProperties.get('SeCountError')
def SeValue = exchProperties.get('SeValue')
def ValidationAuditStartDateTime = '';
def ValidationAuditEndDateTime = '';
def ConversionAuditStartDateTime ='';
def ConversionAuditEndDateTime  ='';
def MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime ='';
def RecordIdentifier='';
def auditEventNumber='';
String add100NanosecondsToString(String dateTimeStr) {
def formatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSSSSS")
def parsedDateTime = LocalDateTime.parse(dateTimeStr, formatter)
def updatedDateTime = parsedDateTime.plusNanos(100)
return updatedDateTime.format(formatter)
}
//Increment timestamps by 200 nanoseconds.
String add200NanosecondsToString(String dateTimeStr) {
def formatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSSSSS")
def parsedDateTime = LocalDateTime.parse(dateTimeStr, formatter)
def updatedDateTime = parsedDateTime.plusNanos(200)
return updatedDateTime.format(formatter)
}
def getCurrentTimestamp() {
def dateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSSSSS")
return dateFormat.format(new Date())
}
auditEventNumber = exchProperties.get('auditEventNumber')
//if(auditEventNumber =="3")
if (auditEventNumber in ["1", "3", "5"])
{
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream()
def maxFormattedLength = 298;
// Parse XML
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream)
StringBuilder errorDetails = new StringBuilder()
def errors = root.'**'.findAll { it.name() == 'Error' }
// Iterate and format each error (excluding description)
errors.eachWithIndex { error, idx ->
def errorBrief = error.Brief?.text()?.trim()
def errorID = error.@ID?.toString()
def errorCategory = error.@Category?.toString()
def errorSeverity = error.@Severity?.toString()
def errorSnip = error.@SNIP?.toString()
// Nested info inside ErrorDataInfo
def errDataInfo = error.ErrorDataInfo
def businessPath = errDataInfo.BusinessPath?.text()?.trim()
if(businessPath!="")
{
businessPath=": "+"ErrPath-"+"${businessPath}";
}
else{
businessPath="";
}
def errorSegment = errDataInfo.Part1?.text()?.trim()
if(errorSegment !="")
{
errorSegment=": "+"ErrSegment-"+"${errorSegment}";
}
else
{
errorSegment="";
}
def errData = errDataInfo.ErrData?.text()?.trim()
if(errData!=""){
errData=": "+"ErrData-"+"${errData}";
}
else{
errData=="";
}
String formatted = "ErrID-${errorID}${errData}: SNIP-${errorSnip}${errorSegment}${businessPath}: ErrBrief-${errorBrief}"
// Truncate if longer than allowed
if (formatted.length() > maxFormattedLength) {
formatted = formatted.take(maxFormattedLength)
}
// Append with || separator if not first
if (idx > 0) {
errorDetails.append("||")
}
errorDetails.append(formatted)
}
// Add to headers
msgHeaders.put("ExtractedErrors", errorDetails.toString())
// Optional response creation
// ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(errorDetails.toString(), msgHeaders)
// context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage)
def AdaptorErrorMessage = '';
//println ("beforecondition: " + newMessageBody)
newMessageBody = errorDetails.toString();
//println ("beforecondition: " + newMessageBody)
if (auditEventNumber == "3"){
if(newMessageBody!="")
{
newMessageBody=errorDetails;
}
else{
newMessageBody="ErrID-0xc000005: SNIP-7: ErrBrief-An error was reported from a JavaScript rule. ErrMsg-All Transaction(s)of this family are rejected due to SNIP Validation Error";
}
}
if(SeCountErrorCheck=="True")
{
if(newMessageBody!=""){
newMessageBody="ErrID-0x810005: ErrData-${SeValue}: ErrSNIP-1: ErrSegment-SE*: ErrPath-SE/96: ErrBrief-The values are not equal.||"+newMessageBody;
}
else{
newMessageBody="ErrID-0x810005: ErrData-${SeValue}: ErrSNIP-1: ErrSegment-SE*: ErrPath-SE/96: ErrBrief-The values are not equal.";
}
}
if (newMessageBody.length() > 5000) {
// Trim the string to 5000 characters and add "(...)" at the end
newMessageBody = newMessageBody.substring(0, 4992) + "(...)"
}
exchProperties['adaptorErrorMessage'] = newMessageBody;
}
if ((auditEventNumber >= "1") && (auditEventNumber <= "5")) {
// Evaluate the second script file
//println ("started executing second script")
//AdaptorErrorMessage=properties.get('AdaptorErrorMessage')
//evaluate(new File("C:/Edifecs/Core/ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/Groovy/P_IB_834_AuditJson.groovy"))
//println ("finished executing second script")
//Increment timestamps by 100 nanoseconds.
//def getCurrentTimestamp() {
// def dateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSSSSS")
//return dateFormat.format(new Date())
//}
exchange = context.exchange
properties = exchange.properties
messages = exchange.messages
message = messages.first()
messageBodyInputStream = message.bodyAsSmartStream.inputStream
InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(messageBodyInputStream)
BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(isr)
RecordIdentifier = properties.get('RecordIdentifier');
auditEventNumber = properties.get('auditEventNumber');
ValidationAuditStartDateTime = properties.get('ValidationAuditStartDateTime')
ConversionAuditStartDateTime = properties.get('ConversionAuditStartDateTime')
def controlnumber = properties.get('controlnumber') ?: ""
def stValues = []
String line = ""
//Send Audit Events As Exchange
if (auditEventNumber == "1") {
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
// properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", newMessageBody)
properties.put("auditTime", getCurrentTimestamp())
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
} else if (auditEventNumber == "2") {
//"PROCESS_START" for EDIFECS-Validation
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime", ValidationAuditStartDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
//"PROCESS_END" for EDIFECS-Validation
ValidationAuditEndDateTime = add100NanosecondsToString(ValidationAuditStartDateTime)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_END")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime", ValidationAuditEndDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
} else if (auditEventNumber == "3") {
//"PROCESS_START" for EDIFECS-Validation
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Validation")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime", ValidationAuditStartDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
//"ERROR" for EDIFECS-Validation
ValidationAuditEndDateTime = add100NanosecondsToString(ValidationAuditStartDateTime)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", newMessageBody)
properties.put("auditTime", ValidationAuditEndDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else if (auditEventNumber == "4") {
//"PROCESS_START" for EDIFECS-Conversion
ConversionAuditStartDateTime = add200NanosecondsToString(ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime", ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
//"PROCESS_END" for EDIFECS-Conversion
ConversionAuditEndDateTime = add200NanosecondsToString(ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_END")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime", ConversionAuditEndDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
//MESSAGE PUBLISHED
MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime = add200NanosecondsToString(ConversionAuditEndDateTime)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus","MESSAGE_PUBLISHED");
properties.put("ProcessStageName","EDIFECS");
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime",MesssagePublishedAuditDateTime);
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
else if (auditEventNumber == "5") {
for (int j = 0; j < 2; j++) {
if (j == 0) {
// Log "PROCESS_START" for EDIFECS-Conversion
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "PROCESS_START")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", "")
properties.put("auditTime", ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
} else {
// Log "ERROR" for EDIFECS-Conversion
ConversionAuditEndDateTime = add200NanosecondsToString(ConversionAuditStartDateTime)
properties.put("AdaptorStatus", "ERROR")
properties.put("ProcessStageName", "EDIFECS-Conversion")
properties.put("adaptorErrorMessage", newMessageBody)
properties.put("auditTime", ConversionAuditEndDateTime)
context.createExchangeResponse(properties, messageBodyInputStream)
}
}
}
}
</file>

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/Groovy/P_IB_834_Pulse_HeaderUpdate.groovy">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import java.io.*;
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
messageBodyInputStream = message.bodyAsSmartStream.inputStream;
InputStreamReader isr = new InputStreamReader(messageBodyInputStream);
BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(isr);
exchProperties.each{ k, v -> msgHeaders.put(k, v) }
String line = "";
String[] splitRecords = null;
int countRecord = 0;
int countSubmitRecord = 0;
StringBuilder dataBuilder = new StringBuilder();
String RecordIdentifier = msgHeaders.get("RecordIdentifier");
String ediFileID = msgHeaders.get("ediFileID");
String EdiFileName = msgHeaders.get("EdiFileName");
String EdiFileType = msgHeaders.get("EdiFileType");
String correlationId = msgHeaders.get("correlationId");
String planCount = msgHeaders.get("planCount");
String XMLFileCreationDate = msgHeaders.get("XMLFileCreationDate");
String TotalEdiTransaction = msgHeaders.get("TotalEdiTransaction");
String TotalMemberCount = msgHeaders.get("TotalMemberCount");
String InterchangeSenderID = msgHeaders.get("InterchangeSenderID");
String InterchangeReceiverID = msgHeaders.get("InterchangeReceiverID");
String recordCount= msgHeaders.get("totalXMLTransactionCount");
String totalXMLTransactionCount = msgHeaders.get("totalXMLTransactionCount");
String inputArchiveFilename  = msgHeaders.get("inputArchiveFilename");
while((line=br.readLine())!=null)
{
// 1. Split By <enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord>
splitRecords = line.split("<enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord>");
for (int i =1;i<splitRecords.length;i++)
{
if(i==1)
{
countSubmitRecord++;
splitRecords[i] = splitRecords[i].replace("<ediMemberRecordSequence>1</ediMemberRecordSequence>","<ediMemberRecordSequence>"+countSubmitRecord+"</ediMemberRecordSequence>");
dataBuilder.append("<enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord>").append(splitRecords[i]);
}
else
{
countRecord++;
countSubmitRecord++;
splitRecords[i] = splitRecords[i].replace("<recordId>"+RecordIdentifier+"</recordId>","<recordId>"+RecordIdentifier+"</recordId>").replace("<ediMemberRecordSequence>1</ediMemberRecordSequence>","<ediMemberRecordSequence>"+countSubmitRecord+"</ediMemberRecordSequence>");
//splitRecords[i] = splitRecords[i].replace("<ediMemberRecordSequence>1</ediMemberRecordSequence>","<ediMemberRecordSequence>"+countSubmitRecord+"</ediMemberRecordSequence>");
dataBuilder.append("<enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord>").append(splitRecords[i]);
}
}
}
def finalString = "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>" +
"<enrollmentSparseIBRequestRoot xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\" xmlns:enroll=\"http://www.ust-global.com/schema/enrollmentsparse\" xmlns:base=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/basetypes\" xmlns:stl=\"http://www.codesynthesis.com/xmlns/xsstl\" xmlns:subscription=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/subscriptionsparse\" xmlns:subsidy=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/subsidy\" xmlns:enrollmenttypes=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/enrollmenttypes\" xmlns:payeeBankAccount=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/payeebankaccounts\" xmlns:minput=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/matchinput\" xmlns:membership=\"http://www.ust-global.com/schema/membershipsparse\" xmlns:membershipsparse=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/membershipsparse\" xmlns:hicn=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/medicarehicn\" xmlns:cobpolicy=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/cobpolicy\" xmlns:membercomplianceprogram=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/membercomplianceprogram\" xmlns:memberfactors=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/memberfactors\" xmlns:sparseResp=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/enrollmentsparseresponse\" xmlns:membercare=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/membercarereserve\" xmlns:enrollment=\"http://www.healthedge.com/connector/schema/enrollmentsparse\">" +
"<header>" +
"<ediFilename>"+EdiFileName+"</ediFilename>"+
"<ediFileId>"+ediFileID+"</ediFileId>"+
"<ediFileType>"+EdiFileType+"</ediFileType>"+
"<ediArchiveFileName>"+inputArchiveFilename+"</ediArchiveFileName>"+
"<totalEdiTransaction>"+TotalEdiTransaction+"</totalEdiTransaction>"+
"<totalMemberCount>"+TotalEdiTransaction+"</totalMemberCount>"+
"<totalXMLTransactionCount>"+TotalEdiTransaction+"</totalXMLTransactionCount>"+
"<XMLfileCreationDate>"+XMLFileCreationDate+"</XMLfileCreationDate>"+
"<correlationId>"+correlationId+"</correlationId>"+
"<senderId>"+InterchangeSenderID+"</senderId>"+
"<receiverId>"+InterchangeReceiverID+"</receiverId>"+
"</header>" +
"<enrollmentSparseIBRequest>" +
"<enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecordList>" +
"<recordCount>"+countSubmitRecord+"</recordCount>"+
dataBuilder.toString() +
"</enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecordList>" +
"</enrollmentSparseIBRequest>" +
"</enrollmentSparseIBRequestRoot>";
newMessageBody = finalString.toString();
ProxyMessage newMessage = context.createNewMessage(newMessageBody, message.getHeaders())
context.createExchangeResponse(msgHeaders, newMessage);
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/Groovy/P_IB_834_Pulse_Report.groovy">
import com.edifecs.etools.xeserver.proxy.ProxyMessage;
import com.edifecs.etools.commons.io.SmartStream;
import groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild;
import java.io.*;
exchange = context.exchange;
exchProperties = exchange.properties;
messages = exchange.messages;
message = messages[0];
msgHeaders = message.headers;
exchProperties.each { k, v -> msgHeaders.put(k, v) }
messageBodyInputStream = message.getBodyAsSmartStream().getInputStream();
def root = new XmlSlurper().parse(messageBodyInputStream);
StringBuilder errorBuilder = new StringBuilder();
def transactionSetControlNumber;
def groupSnipCategory;
def groupCoverageSnip;
def groupErrorID;
def groupErrorBrief;
def groupErrorMsg;
def interchangeSnipCategory;
def interchangeCoverageSnip;
def interchangeErrorID = '';
int recordLevelErrorCountInteger = 0;
String interchangeErrorcounter ;
def dataReportSnipCategory;
def dataReporCoverageSnip;
int memberErrorTotal = 0;
int interchangeErrorcount = 0;
int dataReportError = 0;
int interchangeError = 0;
int memberError = 0;
String recordLevelErrorCountTotal = '';
def interchangeErrorBrief;
def interchangeErrorMsg;
def dataReportErrorBrief;
def dataReportErrorMsg;
def dataReportErrorID;
int transactionErrorcount = 0;
//StringBuilder fileLevelErrors;
StringBuilder transactionErrors;
StringBuilder memberErrors;
StringBuilder healthCoverageErrors;
int healthCoverageErrorCount = 0;
def fileLevelErrors = new StringBuilder()
List snipListFile = new ArrayList();
List rejectedMemberIDList;
List memberFoundLDNS;
List maintenanceTypeCode
int groupErrorcount = 0;
def RecordIdentifier = '';
def EdiFileId = '';
def inputedifilename = '';
def AuditCheck = '';
def InterchangeReceiverID = '';
def InterchangeSenderID = '';
def LineOfBusiness = '';
def recordIdentifiers = '';
def rayIdentifier = '';
def MaintenanceType = '';
def typeOfTransaction = '';
def BGNDate = '';
def ControlNumber = '';

def countErrors(StringBuilder fileLevelErrors) {
// Convert the StringBuilder to a String
String errorString = fileLevelErrors.toString()
// Check if the string is empty
if (errorString.isEmpty()) {
// If empty, there are no errors
return 0
} else {
// Split the string by '~'
String[] errors = errorString.split("~")
// Count the errors
return errors.length
}
}

inputedifilename = DataReportField.text();
}
if (entireDocumentField == "AuditCheck") {
AuditCheck = DataReportField.text();
}

{

dataReportErrorID = error.@ID;

{
dataReporCoverageSnip = error.@SNIP.text().toString();
if (dataReporCoverageSnip != null && !snipListFile.contains(dataReporCoverageSnip))
{
snipListFile.add(dataReporCoverageSnip);
}
dataReportErrorcount = dataReportErrorcount + 1;
dataReportErrorcounter = Integer.toString(dataReportErrorcount);
if (!fileLevelErrors.isEmpty())
{
String temp = "~" + "${dataReportErrorID}" + ":" + "EntireDocumentError " + "${dataReportErrorcounter}" + " " + "${dataReportErrorBrief}" + "${dataReportErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
else
{
String temp = "${dataReportErrorID}" + ":" + "EntireDocumentError " + "${dataReportErrorcounter}" + " " + "${dataReportErrorBrief}" + "${dataReportErrorMsg}";
fileLevelErrors.append(temp);
}
errorCount = countErrors(fileLevelErrors);
//println('EntireDocumentErrorcount' + errorCount);
}
if (errorCount == 40)
break;
}

}

{

{

}
else

<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/SplitRule/P_IB_834_EDIFamilySplit.xml">
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><DataSplitRules Version="2.0" N="Data Splitting rules" Description="Default data splitting rule set" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="DataSplitRules.xsd" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><Rule name="familySplit">Transaction[@AckCode='A'] and Member[@AckCode='A'] and Member[@SubscriberID='##unique##']</Rule></DataSplitRules>
</file>
<file path="ArtifactsRepository/Enrollment/IBEnrollmentCommon/SplitRule/P_IB_834_EDISplit.xml">
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><DataSplitRules Version="2.0" N="Data Splitting rules" Description="Default data splitting rule set" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="DataSplitRules.xsd" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><Rule name="good">Transaction[@AckCode='A'] and Member[@AckCode='A' and batch(.='1')]</Rule><Rule name="bad">Transaction[@AckCode='R' or @AckCode='P'] and  Member[@AckCode='R' or @AckCode='A' or @AckCode='P' and batch(.='1')]</Rule></DataSplitRules>
</file>

we are mapping INS03 to /enrollment/member/maintenanceTypeCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,021,001,024,025,030</P><P N="out">,CREATE,AMEND,TERMINATE,REINSTATE,AUDIT</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="51" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="52" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="18" N="Conversional Copy_INS05_Benefit Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">A - Active
C - COBRA
S - Surviving Insured
T - TEFRA
INS05 map to /enrollment/member/benefitStatusCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,A,C,S,T</P><P N="out">,Active,COBRA,Surviving Insured,TEFRA</P><P N="comment">,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="54" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="55" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="29" N="Conversional Copy_INS08_Employment Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">AO - Active Military
AU - Active Military
RT - Retired
L1 - Leave of Absence
FT - Full-Time
PT - Part-Time
AC - Active for enrolled Members
TE - Terminate
INS08 map to /enrollment/member/employmentInfo/employmentStatusCodeCode/shortName</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,AO,AU,RT,L1,FT,PT,AC,TE</P><P N="out">,Active Military,Active Military,Retired,Leave of Absence,Full-Time,Part-Time,Active for enrolled Members,Terminate</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="99" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="100" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="30" N="Conversional Copy_INS09_StudentStatusCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">F - Full-Time
N - Not a Student
P - Part-Time
INS09 map to enrollment/member/dependentVerification/dependentVerification/studentSchoolInfo/studentStatusCode
/enrollment/member/dependentVerification/dependentVerification/verificationType</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,F,N,P</P><P N="out">,Full-Time,Not a Student,Part-Time</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="102" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="103" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="32" N="Conversional Copy_INS10_ResponseCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If response code is 'Y' we are mapping true to  IsHandicapped
If response code is 'N' we are mapping false to  IsHandicapped
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,Y,N</P><P N="out">,true,false</P><P N="comment">,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="110" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="109" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="41" N="Convert Date/Time_INS12_Date of Death" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Format : yyyy-MM-dd

Map DMG04 to Marital Status Code</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,D,X,M,B,S,I,W,U,R</P><P N="out">,Divorced,Legally Separated,Married,Registered Domestic Partner,Separated,Single,Widowed,Unmarried,Unreported</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="168" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="169" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="50" N="Conversional Copy_DMG06_Citizenship Status code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Converting the value to ImmigrationStatus

N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="165" N="Conditional Copy_2000DTP0250_Member Level Dates" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">In this condition copy first we are cheacking the transaction is Ammend/Create/terminate.
If it is ammend we are cheacking DTP under ST segment,DTP01=303 if it is true then we map DTP03 to asofdate.
And DTP01!=303,We are cheacking DTP01=007 if it is true then we map DTP03 to Asofdate.
If it is Terminate we are cheacking DTP under 2000 loop,DTP01=357 then we are mapping DTP03 to Asofdate.
And if DTP01!=357,
we are cheacking DTP under 2200and 2300 wheather they equal to DTP*349.
if it is equal then map corresponding DTP03 to Asofdate</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">1</P><P var N301_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100C&quot;);
var N302_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100C&quot;);
var N401_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100C&quot;);
var N402_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100C&quot;);
var N403_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100C&quot;);
var N404_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100C&quot;);
var N301_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100A&quot;);
var N302_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100A&quot;);
var N401_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100A&quot;);
var N402_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100A&quot;);
var N403_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100A&quot;);
var N404_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100A&quot;);
if(N301_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100C);
if(N403_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100C.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100C.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100C);
}
else if (N301_2100A != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100A);
if(N403_2100A != &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100A.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100A.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100A);
}

= ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordUID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordUID&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;recordIdentifier  &quot; + recordIdentifier);
var count_2000_loop = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;count_2000_loop&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;1)
{
if(count_2000_loop == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID+(count_2000_loop-1)+'-');
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

{

}

{

}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1465" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1466" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1463" FP="X" ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordIdentifier = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifier&quot;);
var counter_2000 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;counter_2000&quot;);
var controlNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;controlNumber&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;=1)
{
if(counter_2000 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber+(counter_2000-1)+&quot;-&quot;);
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

//Assigns input valyes to resArr array

{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{

}
}
myRS.insertRow();

{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{

}
}

myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;, myRS1, true);

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01&quot;);
var Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02&quot;);
var Medicare_StartDate_338 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_StartDate_338&quot;);
var Medicare_EndDate_339 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_EndDate_339&quot;);
var Supplemental_REF_F6 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Supplemental_REF_F6&quot;);
var Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted =&quot;&quot;
var Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted =&quot;&quot;
if((Supplemental_REF_F6 != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Medicare_StartDate_338 != &quot;&quot; || Medicare_EndDate_339 != &quot;&quot;))
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Supplemental_REF_F6);
if(Medicare_StartDate_338 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Medicare_StartDate_338.length == 8)
{
Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted = Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(0,4)+'-'+Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(4,2)+'-'+Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(6,2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted);
}
if(Medicare_EndDate_339 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Medicare_EndDate_339.length == 8)
{
Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted = Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(0,4)+'-'+Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(4,2)+'-'+Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(6,2)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted);
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 2)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;true&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'A')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'B')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'C')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;1&quot;)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;3&quot;)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 2)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;2&quot;)
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2497" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2492" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2493" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2495" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2496" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2498" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="2499" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="2500" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="2501" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="2502" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="2503" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="2504" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/><CP ID="2505" FP="X" P="10" N="result11"/><CP ID="2506" FP="X" P="11" N="result12"/><CP ID="2509" FP="X" P="12" N="result13"/><CP ID="2510" FP="X" P="13" N="result14"/><CP ID="2516" FP="X" P="14" N="result15"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="591" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01&quot;,&quot;&quot;);

var Plan_EligBeginDate_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_EligBeginDate_356&quot;);
if(Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(6,2));
}
else if(Plan_EligBeginDate_356 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligBeginDate_356.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(6,2));
}
//Plan End Date
//Plan End Date

var Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitEndDate_349&quot;);
var Plan_EligEndDate_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_EligEndDate_357&quot;);
var endDate = &quot;&quot;; // Initialize an empty variable for the end date
if (Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6, 2);
} else if (Plan_EligEndDate_357 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligEndDate_357.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(6, 2);
} else {
// Default to 1/1/3000 if neither date is available
endDate = '3000-01-01';
}
// Report the end date (this will either be the formatted date or the default)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, endDate);

var Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348&quot;);
var Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitEndDate_349&quot;);
if(NM101_2310 == &quot;P3&quot;)
{
if(NM102_2310 == &quot;1&quot;)
{

if(Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 != &quot;&quot;)

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM104_2310);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM103_2310);
if(NM108_2310 == &quot;SV&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109_2310);
}
}
else if (NM102_2310 == &quot;2&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;PCP&quot;);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6,2));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,NM103_2310);
if(NM108_2310 == &quot;SV&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,NM109_2310);
}
}
}

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first line&quot;);
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
myRS.last();// Move the cursor to the last record in the recordset
var RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row of the recordset
var earliestStartDate_025=&quot;&quot;;
var earliestStartDate = &quot;&quot;;
var earliestEndDate = &quot;&quot;;
var asofdate_check = &quot;&quot;;
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;earliest date is &quot;+earliestStartDate);
// The code enters a while loop and continues as long as the value of RS1 is greater than 0.
var dtp_2000_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_356&quot;);
var dtp_2000_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_357&quot;);
var dtp_2000_303 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_303&quot;);
var HD01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HD01&quot;);
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Retrieve the fields of the current row in the recordset using myRS.getFields()earliestStartDate
var currentDate = new Date(Fields[1].substr(0,4),Fields[1].substr(4,2)-1,Fields[1].substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;CurrentDate&quot;+currentDate);
if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate == &quot;&quot;)
{
earliestStartDate=currentDate;
}
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate)
{
earliestStartDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first loop is &quot;+  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;349&quot;)
{
if(earliestEndDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestEndDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestEndDate)
{
earliestEndDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;349&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 357 &quot;+ dtp_2000_357);
if(dtp_2000_357 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check ==&quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check=dtp_2000_357
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;second loop is &quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate_025 == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate_025=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate_025)
{
earliestStartDate_025 = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestEndDate);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();// Move the cursor to the previous row in the result set
RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row from the result set and assign it to the RS1 variable
}
if(HD01 == &quot;001&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 303 &quot;+ dtp_2000_303);
if(dtp_2000_303 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check = dtp_2000_303;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop 001 is &quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestStartDate);
}
}
if(earliestStartDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate=earliestStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestStartDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop not earliest start date&quot;);
}
if(earliestEndDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestEndDate=earliestEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestEndDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop not earliest end date&quot;);
}
if(earliestStartDate_025!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate_025=earliestStartDate_025.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, formattedEarliestStartDate_025);
}
myRS.clear();//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, earliestStartDate.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+earliestStartDate.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+earliestStartDate.substr(6,2));
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2720" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2721" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2719" FP="X" P="0" N="asOfDate"/><CP ID="2741" FP="X" P="1" N="asOfDate_025"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="638" N="JavaScript_asOFDate_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2726" FP="A" P="0" N="DTP01"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2727" FP="A" P="1" C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2789" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="669" T="Clone"><CPs><CP ID="2793" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2794" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="2791" FP="X" P="0" N="result3"/><CP ID="2792" FP="X" P="1" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="673" N="JavaScript_QualifierList" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var memberSupplimental_Id  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;memberSupplimental_Id&quot;);
var REF_2000_REF02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_02_0F&quot;);
var REF_1L_02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_1L_02&quot;);
var asOfDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate&quot;);
var asOfDate_025 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate_025&quot;);
var INS03  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
if(REF_2000_REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;0F&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, REF_2000_REF02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{	//ec_ResultHelper.println(edieligibilityenddate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, asOfDate);
}
}
if(REF_1L_02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;1L&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, REF_1L_02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, asOfDate);
}
}
var array = new Array();
var value = new Array();
if(memberSupplimental_Id != &quot;&quot;)
{
array = memberSupplimental_Id.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;array.length;i++)
{
value = array[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, value[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, value[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2829" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2830" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2817" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2818" FP="X" P="1" we are mapping INS03 to /enrollment/subscription/maintenanceReasonCode/codeSetName</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,021,001,024,025,030</P><P N="out">,SubscriptionCreateReason,SubscriptionAmendReason,SubscriptionTerminateReason,SubscriptionReinstateReason,SubscriptionAuditReason</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="47" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="48" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="17" N="Conversional Copy_INS03_MTC_maintenanceTypeCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If INS03=021, CREATE;

If INS03=025, REINSTATE,
If INS03=030, AUDIT

N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="165" N="Conditional Copy_2000DTP0250_Member Level Dates" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">In this condition copy first we are cheacking the transaction is Ammend/Create/terminate.
If it is ammend we are cheacking DTP under ST segment,DTP01=303 if it is true then we map DTP03 to asofdate.
And DTP01!=303,We are cheacking DTP01=007 if it is true then we map DTP03 to Asofdate.
If it is Terminate we are cheacking DTP under 2000 loop,DTP01=357 then we are mapping DTP03 to Asofdate.
And if DTP01!=357,
we are cheacking DTP under 2200and 2300 wheather they equal to DTP*349.
if it is equal then map corresponding DTP03 to Asofdate</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">1</P><P var N301_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100C&quot;);
var N302_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100C&quot;);
var N401_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100C&quot;);
var N402_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100C&quot;);
var N403_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100C&quot;);
var N404_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100C&quot;);
var N301_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100A&quot;);
var N302_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100A&quot;);
var N401_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100A&quot;);
var N402_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100A&quot;);
var N403_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100A&quot;);
var N404_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100A&quot;);
if(N301_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100C);
if(N403_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100C.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100C.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100C);
}
else if (N301_2100A != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100A);
if(N403_2100A != &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100A.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100A.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100A);
}

= ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordUID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordUID&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;recordIdentifier  &quot; + recordIdentifier);
var count_2000_loop = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;count_2000_loop&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;1)
{
if(count_2000_loop == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID+(count_2000_loop-1)+'-');
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

{

N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="427" N="JavaScript-recordID" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var recordIdentifierCount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordIdentifier = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifier&quot;);
var counter_2000 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;counter_2000&quot;);
var controlNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;controlNumber&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;=1)
{
if(counter_2000 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber+(counter_2000-1)+&quot;-&quot;);
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_1&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
for(i=0;i&lt;3;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_1&quot;, myRS, true);
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
for(i=3;i&lt;5;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr1[i-3] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;, myRS1, true);
