var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
resArr[0] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1)==&quot;360&quot;)
resArr[1] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;DisabilityInfo&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2321" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2323" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2324" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2322" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="524" N="JavaScript_2200_DisabilityInfo_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;DisabilityInfo&quot;);
myRS.last();
//Assigns the recorset array values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Report the output values to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}

{

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first line&quot;);
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
myRS.last();// Move the cursor to the last record in the recordset
var RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row of the recordset
var earliestStartDate_025=&quot;&quot;;
var earliestStartDate = &quot;&quot;;
var earliestEndDate = &quot;&quot;;
var asofdate_check = &quot;&quot;;
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;earliest date is &quot;+earliestStartDate);
// The code enters a while loop and continues as long as the value of RS1 is greater than 0.
var dtp_2000_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_356&quot;);
var dtp_2000_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_357&quot;);
var dtp_2000_303 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_303&quot;);
var HD01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HD01&quot;);
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Retrieve the fields of the current row in the recordset using myRS.getFields()earliestStartDate
var currentDate = new Date(Fields[1].substr(0,4),Fields[1].substr(4,2)-1,Fields[1].substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;CurrentDate&quot;+currentDate);
if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate == &quot;&quot;)
{
earliestStartDate=currentDate;

var memberSupplimental_Id  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;memberSupplimental_Id&quot;);
var REF_2000_REF02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_02_0F&quot;);
var REF_1L_02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_1L_02&quot;);
var asOfDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate&quot;);
var asOfDate_025 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate_025&quot;);
var INS03  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
if(REF_2000_REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;0F&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, REF_2000_REF02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate);

{	//ec_ResultHelper.println(edieligibilityenddate);

}
}

{

{

}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, asOfDate);
}
}
var array = new Array();
var value = new Array();
if(memberSupplimental_Id != &quot;&quot;)
{
array = memberSupplimental_Id.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;array.length;i++)
{
value = array[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, value[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, value[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();

ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;, myRS2, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2916" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2917" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2915" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="693" N="JavaScript-Output_LUI" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve recordsets
var myRS  = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '7'
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '6'
var myRS2=  ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;); // contains the fields no language indicators
var Fields = myRS.getFields();   // retrive fields of RecordSet RS
var Fields1 = myRS1.getFields(); // retrive fields of RecordSet RS1
// Checks whether identification codes are the same
if (Fields[0] == Fields1[0])
{
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;compare&quot;);
if (Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot; || Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6 or 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields[0]);
}
}
//checks whether identification codes are different
else if	(Fields[0] != Fields1[0])
{
if(Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
if(Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
}
else if	(Fields[1]==&quot;7&quot;) // if only language indicator 7 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
else if	(Fields1[1]==&quot;6&quot;) // if only language indiactor 6 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
myRS2.last();                      // go to last row
var Row = myRS2.getRow();
var reportedCodes = {};            // acts like a Set
while (Row &gt; 0)
{
var Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
var code = Fields2[0];
if (
code != Fields[0] &amp;&amp;
code != Fields1[0] &amp;&amp;
!reportedCodes[code]        // block ALL duplicates
)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, code);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
reportedCodes[code] = true; // mark as reported
}
myRS2.previous();
Row = myRS2.getRow();
}
// clear all the recordsets
myRS.clear();
myRS1.clear();
myRS2.clear();
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2930" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2931" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2918" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2919" FP="X" P="1" O="2850"/></ReverseConnectionPoints/></Targets><Fs><F ID="4" N="Change Variable_INS03_MTC" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Change variable for Maintaince Type Code
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">1</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="21" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="15" N="Conversional Copy_INS01_ResponseCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If response code is 'Y' we are mapping true to memberIsSubscriber
If response code is 'N' we are mapping false to memberIsSubscriber
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,Y,N</P><P N="out">,true,false</P><P N="comment">,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="43" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="44" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="16" N="Conversional Copy_INS03_MTC_codeSetName" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If INS03=021, SubscriptionCreateReason;
If INS03=001, SubscriptionAmendReason;
If INS03=024, SubscriptionTeminateReason;
If INS03=025, SubscriptionReinstateReason,
If INS03=030, SubscriptionAuditReason
we are mapping INS03 to /enrollment/subscription/maintenanceReasonCode/codeSetName</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,021,001,024,025,030</P><P N="out">,SubscriptionCreateReason,SubscriptionAmendReason,SubscriptionTerminateReason,SubscriptionReinstateReason,SubscriptionAuditReason</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="47" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="48" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="17" N="Conversional Copy_INS03_MTC_maintenanceTypeCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If INS03=021, CREATE;
If INS03=001, AMEND;
If INS03=024, TERMINATE;
If INS03=025, REINSTATE,
If INS03=030, AUDIT
we are mapping INS03 to /enrollment/member/maintenanceTypeCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,021,001,024,025,030</P><P N="out">,CREATE,AMEND,TERMINATE,REINSTATE,AUDIT</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="51" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="52" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="18" N="Conversional Copy_INS05_Benefit Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">A - Active
C - COBRA
S - Surviving Insured
T - TEFRA
INS05 map to /enrollment/member/benefitStatusCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,A,C,S,T</P><P N="out">,Active,COBRA,Surviving Insured,TEFRA</P><P N="comment">,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="54" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="55" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="29" N="Conversional Copy_INS08_Employment Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">AO - Active Military
AU - Active Military
RT - Retired
L1 - Leave of Absence
FT - Full-Time
PT - Part-Time
AC - Active for enrolled Members
TE - Terminate
INS08 map to /enrollment/member/employmentInfo/employmentStatusCodeCode/shortName</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,AO,AU,RT,L1,FT,PT,AC,TE</P><P N="out">,Active Military,Active Military,Retired,Leave of Absence,Full-Time,Part-Time,Active for enrolled Members,Terminate</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="99" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="100" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="30" N="Conversional Copy_INS09_StudentStatusCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">F - Full-Time
N - Not a Student
P - Part-Time
INS09 map to enrollment/member/dependentVerification/dependentVerification/studentSchoolInfo/studentStatusCode
/enrollment/member/dependentVerification/dependentVerification/verificationType</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,F,N,P</P><P N="out">,Full-Time,Not a Student,Part-Time</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="102" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="103" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="32" N="Conversional Copy_INS10_ResponseCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If response code is 'Y' we are mapping true to  IsHandicapped
If response code is 'N' we are mapping false to  IsHandicapped
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,Y,N</P><P N="out">,true,false</P><P N="comment">,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="110" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="109" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="41" N="Convert Date/Time_INS12_Date of Death" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Format : yyyy-MM-dd
INS12 map to dateOfDeath</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="138" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="137" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="42" N="Convert Date/Time_DMG02" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Converting the date format to CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="160" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="161" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="43" N="Conversional Copy_DMG03_GenderCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">M=Male,F=Female,U=Unknown
Map DMG03 to Gendercode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="164" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="165" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="44" N="Conversional Copy_DMG04_Marital Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">D=Divorced,X Legally Separated,
M= Married, B=Registered Domestic Partner, S=Separated,I=Single, W=Widowed, U=Unmarried, R=Unreported
Map DMG04 to Marital Status Code</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,D,X,M,B,S,I,W,U,R</P><P N="out">,Divorced,Legally Separated,Married,Registered Domestic Partner,Separated,Single,Widowed,Unmarried,Unreported</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="168" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="169" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="50" N="Conversional Copy_DMG06_Citizenship Status code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Converting the value to ImmigrationStatus
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in"/><P N="out">ImmigrationStatus</P><P N="comment"/></Ps><CPs><CP ID="187" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="188" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="51" N="Conversional Copy_HLH01_HealthRelatedInformation" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">U 	Unknown
N 	None
S 	Substance Abuse
T 	Tobacco Use
X 	Tobacco and Substance Abuse
Map HLH01_2100A to /enrollment/member/smokingStatus</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,U,N,S,T,X</P><P N="out">,Unknown,Non Smoker,Smoker,Tobacco Use,Tobacco and Substance Abuse</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="190" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="191" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="55" T="SetValue"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Setting the hard core value to IndividualPhoneType
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="231" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="IndividualPhoneType"/><CP ID="230" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="58" N="Convert Date/Time_DMG02" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Converting the date format to CCYYMMDD to YYYYMMDD</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="241" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="240" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="59" N="Conversional Copy_DMG03_GenderCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">F = Female
M = Male
Map DMG03_2100B to /enrollment/member/oldMemberData/genderCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="245" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="244" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="60" N="Conversional Copy_DMG04_Marital Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">B	Registered Domestic Partner
D	Divorced
I	Single
M	Married
R	Unreported
S	Separated
U	Unmarried
W	Widowed
X	Legally Separated

copy first we are cheacking the transaction is Ammend/Create/terminate.
If it is ammend we are cheacking DTP under ST segment,DTP01=303 if it is true then we map DTP03 to asofdate.
And DTP01!=303,We are cheacking DTP01=007 if it is true then we map DTP03 to Asofdate.
If it is Terminate we are cheacking DTP under 2000 loop,DTP01=357 then we are mapping DTP03 to Asofdate.
And if DTP01!=357,
we are cheacking DTP under 2200and 2300 wheather they equal to DTP*349.
if it is equal then map corresponding DTP03 to Asofdate</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">1</P><P var N301_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100C&quot;);
var N302_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100C&quot;);
var N401_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100C&quot;);
var N402_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100C&quot;);
var N403_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100C&quot;);
var N404_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100C&quot;);
var N301_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100A&quot;);
var N302_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100A&quot;);
var N401_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100A&quot;);
var N402_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100A&quot;);
var N403_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100A&quot;);
var N404_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100A&quot;);
if(N301_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100C);
if(N403_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100C.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100C.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100C);
}
else if (N301_2100A != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100A);
if(N403_2100A != &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100A.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100A.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100A);
}

= ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordUID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordUID&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;recordIdentifier  &quot; + recordIdentifier);
var count_2000_loop = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;count_2000_loop&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;1)
{
if(count_2000_loop == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID+(count_2000_loop-1)+'-');
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1148" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1147" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="290" T="LookAhead"><Ps C="S"><P {

if(qualifier == 'D8')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date.substr(0,8));
}
else if (qualifier == 'RD8')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date.substr(0,8));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, date.substr(9,8));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1465" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1466" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1463" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="427" N="JavaScript-recordID" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var recordIdentifierCount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordIdentifier = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifier&quot;);
var counter_2000 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;counter_2000&quot;);
var controlNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;controlNumber&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;=1)
{
if(counter_2000 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber+(counter_2000-1)+&quot;-&quot;);
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_1&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
for(i=0;i&lt;3;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_1&quot;, myRS, true);
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
for(i=3;i&lt;5;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr1[i-3] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;, myRS1, true);

{

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01&quot;);
var Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02&quot;);
var Medicare_StartDate_338 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_StartDate_338&quot;);
var Medicare_EndDate_339 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_EndDate_339&quot;);
var Supplemental_REF_F6 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Supplemental_REF_F6&quot;);
var Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted =&quot;&quot;
var Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted =&quot;&quot;
if((Supplemental_REF_F6 != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Medicare_StartDate_338 != &quot;&quot; || Medicare_EndDate_339 != &quot;&quot;))
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Supplemental_REF_F6);
if(Medicare_StartDate_338 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Medicare_StartDate_338.length == 8)
{
Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted = Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(0,4)+'-'+Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(4,2)+'-'+Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(6,2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted);
}
if(Medicare_EndDate_339 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Medicare_EndDate_339.length == 8)
{
Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted = Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(0,4)+'-'+Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(4,2)+'-'+Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(6,2)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted);
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 2)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;true&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'A')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'B')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'C')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;1&quot;)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;3&quot;)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 2)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;2&quot;)
}

if(Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(6,2));
}
else if(Plan_EligBeginDate_356 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligBeginDate_356.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(6,2));
}
//Plan End Date
//Plan End Date
// Plan End Date

if (Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6, 2);
} else if (Plan_EligEndDate_357 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligEndDate_357.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(6, 2);
} else {
// Default to 1/1/3000 if neither date is available
endDate = '3000-01-01';
}
// Report the end date (this will either be the formatted date or the default)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, endDate);

N="length">10</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2716" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2715" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="636" N="JavaScript_asOfDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first line&quot;);
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
myRS.last();// Move the cursor to the last record in the recordset
var RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row of the recordset
var earliestStartDate_025=&quot;&quot;;
var earliestStartDate = &quot;&quot;;
var earliestEndDate = &quot;&quot;;
var asofdate_check = &quot;&quot;;
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;earliest date is &quot;+earliestStartDate);
// The code enters a while loop and continues as long as the value of RS1 is greater than 0.
var dtp_2000_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_356&quot;);
var dtp_2000_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_357&quot;);
var dtp_2000_303 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_303&quot;);
var HD01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HD01&quot;);
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Retrieve the fields of the current row in the recordset using myRS.getFields()earliestStartDate
var currentDate = new Date(Fields[1].substr(0,4),Fields[1].substr(4,2)-1,Fields[1].substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;CurrentDate&quot;+currentDate);
if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate == &quot;&quot;)
{
earliestStartDate=currentDate;
}
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate)
{
earliestStartDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first loop is &quot;+  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;349&quot;)
{
if(earliestEndDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestEndDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestEndDate)
{
earliestEndDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;349&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 357 &quot;+ dtp_2000_357);
if(dtp_2000_357 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check ==&quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check=dtp_2000_357
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;second loop is &quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate_025 == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate_025=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate_025)
{
earliestStartDate_025 = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestEndDate);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();// Move the cursor to the previous row in the result set
RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row from the result set and assign it to the RS1 variable
}
if(HD01 == &quot;001&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 303 &quot;+ dtp_2000_303);
if(dtp_2000_303 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check = dtp_2000_303;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop 001 is &quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestStartDate);
}
}
if(earliestStartDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate=earliestStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestStartDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop not earliest start date&quot;);
}
if(earliestEndDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestEndDate=earliestEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestEndDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop not earliest end date&quot;);
}
if(earliestStartDate_025!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate_025=earliestStartDate_025.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, formattedEarliestStartDate_025);
}
myRS.clear();//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, earliestStartDate.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+earliestStartDate.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+earliestStartDate.substr(6,2));
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2720" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2721" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2719" FP="X" P="0" N="asOfDate"/><CP ID="2741" FP="X" P="1" N="asOfDate_025"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="638" N="JavaScript_asOFDate_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2726" FP="A" P="0" N="DTP01"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2727" FP="A" P="1" N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2794" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="2791" FP="X" P="0" N="result3"/><CP ID="2792" FP="X" P="1" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="673" N="JavaScript_QualifierList" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var memberSupplimental_Id  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;memberSupplimental_Id&quot;);
var REF_2000_REF02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_02_0F&quot;);
var REF_1L_02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_1L_02&quot;);
var asOfDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate&quot;);
var asOfDate_025 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate_025&quot;);
var INS03  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
if(REF_2000_REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;0F&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, REF_2000_REF02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{	//ec_ResultHelper.println(edieligibilityenddate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, asOfDate);
}
}
if(REF_1L_02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;1L&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, REF_1L_02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, asOfDate);
}
}
var array = new Array();
var value = new Array();
if(memberSupplimental_Id != &quot;&quot;)
{
array = memberSupplimental_Id.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;array.length;i++)
{
value = array[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, value[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, value[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2829" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2830" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2817" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2818" FP="X" P="1" Map DMG03 to Gendercode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2900" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2899" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="690" N="JavaScript-Input LUI 1" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;, myRS, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2908" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2909" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2907" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="691" N="JavaScript-Input LUI 2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;, myRS1, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2911" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2912" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2910" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="692" N="JavaScript Input No Language Indicator" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS2.insertRow();
myRS2.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;, myRS2, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2916" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2917" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2915" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="693" N="JavaScript-Output_LUI" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve recordsets
var myRS  = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '7'
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '6'
var myRS2=  ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;); // contains the fields no language indicators
var Fields = myRS.getFields();   // retrive fields of RecordSet RS
var Fields1 = myRS1.getFields(); // retrive fields of RecordSet RS1
// Checks whether identification codes are the same
if (Fields[0] == Fields1[0])
{
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;compare&quot;);
if (Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot; || Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6 or 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields[0]);
}
}
//checks whether identification codes are different
else if	(Fields[0] != Fields1[0])
{
if(Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
if(Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
}
else if	(Fields[1]==&quot;7&quot;) // if only language indicator 7 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
else if	(Fields1[1]==&quot;6&quot;) // if only language indiactor 6 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
// if language indicator is empty or null
myRS2.last(); // points to the last row in the recorset
var Row =myRS2.getRow() // get the current row number of the recordset
while(Row&gt;0) // traverse through eery row in the Recordset
{
// Report the results
var Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();  //retrive fields of RecordSet RS2
if( Fields2[0]!= Fields[0] &amp;&amp;  Fields2[0]!= Fields1[0])
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields2[0]);
myRS2.previous();
var Row =myRS2.getRow();
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
// clear all the recordsets
myRS.clear();
myRS2.clear();
myRS2.clear();
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2930" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2931" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2918" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2919" FP="X" P="1" O="2850"/></ReverseConnectionPoints/></Targets><Fs><F ID="4" N="Change Variable_INS03_MTC" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Change variable for Maintaince Type Code
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">1</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="21" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="15" N="Conversional Copy_INS01_ResponseCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If response code is 'Y' we are mapping true to memberIsSubscriber
If response code is 'N' we are mapping false to memberIsSubscriber
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,Y,N</P><P N="out">,true,false</P><P N="comment">,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="43" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="44" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="16" N="Conversional Copy_INS03_MTC_codeSetName" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If INS03=021, SubscriptionCreateReason;
If INS03=001, SubscriptionAmendReason;
If INS03=024, SubscriptionTeminateReason;
If INS03=025, SubscriptionReinstateReason,
If INS03=030, SubscriptionAuditReason
we are mapping INS03 to /enrollment/subscription/maintenanceReasonCode/codeSetName</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,021,001,024,025,030</P><P N="out">,SubscriptionCreateReason,SubscriptionAmendReason,SubscriptionTerminateReason,SubscriptionReinstateReason,SubscriptionAuditReason</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="47" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="48" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="17" N="Conversional Copy_INS03_MTC_maintenanceTypeCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If INS03=021, CREATE;
If INS03=001, AMEND;
If INS03=024, TERMINATE;
If INS03=025, REINSTATE,
If INS03=030, AUDIT
we are mapping INS03 to /enrollment/member/maintenanceTypeCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,021,001,024,025,030</P><P N="out">,CREATE,AMEND,TERMINATE,REINSTATE,AUDIT</P><P N="comment">,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="51" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="52" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="18" N="Conversional Copy_INS05_Benefit Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">A - Active
C - COBRA
S - Surviving Insured
T - TEFRA
INS05 map to /enrollment/member/benefitStatusCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,A,C,S,T</P><P N="out">,Active,COBRA,Surviving Insured,TEFRA</P><P N="comment">,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="54" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="55" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="29" N="Conversional Copy_INS08_Employment Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">AO - Active Military
AU - Active Military
RT - Retired
L1 - Leave of Absence
FT - Full-Time
PT - Part-Time
AC - Active for enrolled Members
TE - Terminate
INS08 map to /enrollment/member/employmentInfo/employmentStatusCodeCode/shortName</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,AO,AU,RT,L1,FT,PT,AC,TE</P><P N="out">,Active Military,Active Military,Retired,Leave of Absence,Full-Time,Part-Time,Active for enrolled Members,Terminate</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="99" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="100" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="30" N="Conversional Copy_INS09_StudentStatusCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">F - Full-Time
N - Not a Student
P - Part-Time
INS09 map to enrollment/member/dependentVerification/dependentVerification/studentSchoolInfo/studentStatusCode
/enrollment/member/dependentVerification/dependentVerification/verificationType</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,F,N,P</P><P N="out">,Full-Time,Not a Student,Part-Time</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="102" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="103" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="32" N="Conversional Copy_INS10_ResponseCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">If response code is 'Y' we are mapping true to  IsHandicapped
If response code is 'N' we are mapping false to  IsHandicapped
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,Y,N</P><P N="out">,true,false</P><P N="comment">,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="110" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="109" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="41" N="Convert Date/Time_INS12_Date of Death" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Format : yyyy-MM-dd
INS12 map to dateOfDeath</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="138" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="137" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="42" N="Convert Date/Time_DMG02" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Converting the date format to CCYYMMDD to YYMMDD</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="160" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="161" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="43" N="Conversional Copy_DMG03_GenderCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">M=Male,F=Female,U=Unknown
Map DMG03 to Gendercode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="164" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="165" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="44" N="Conversional Copy_DMG04_Marital Status Code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">D=Divorced,X Legally Separated,
M= Married, B=Registered Domestic Partner, S=Separated,I=Single, W=Widowed, U=Unmarried, R=Unreported
Map DMG04 to Marital Status Code</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,D,X,M,B,S,I,W,U,R</P><P N="out">,Divorced,Legally Separated,Married,Registered Domestic Partner,Separated,Single,Widowed,Unmarried,Unreported</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="168" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="169" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="50" N="Conversional Copy_DMG06_Citizenship Status code" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{1c5b61ef-44fa-4a32-aefb-e846cf85cbed}">Converting the value to ImmigrationStatus

copy first we are cheacking the transaction is Ammend/Create/terminate.
If it is ammend we are cheacking DTP under ST segment,DTP01=303 if it is true then we map DTP03 to asofdate.
And DTP01!=303,We are cheacking DTP01=007 if it is true then we map DTP03 to Asofdate.
If it is Terminate we are cheacking DTP under 2000 loop,DTP01=357 then we are mapping DTP03 to Asofdate.
And if DTP01!=357,
we are cheacking DTP under 2200and 2300 wheather they equal to DTP*349.
if it is equal then map corresponding DTP03 to Asofdate</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">1</P><P var N301_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100C&quot;);
var N302_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100C&quot;);
var N401_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100C&quot;);
var N402_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100C&quot;);
var N403_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100C&quot;);
var N404_2100C = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100C&quot;);
var N301_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2100A&quot;);
var N302_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N302_2100A&quot;);
var N401_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2100A&quot;);
var N402_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2100A&quot;);
var N403_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2100A&quot;);
var N404_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2100A&quot;);
if(N301_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100C);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100C);
if(N403_2100C != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100C.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100C.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100C);
}
else if (N301_2100A != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N302_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N401_2100A);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N402_2100A);
if(N403_2100A != &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N403_2100A.substr(0,5));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N403_2100A.substr(5,9));
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N404_2100A);
}

= ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordUID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordUID&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;recordIdentifier  &quot; + recordIdentifier);
var count_2000_loop = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;count_2000_loop&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;1)
{
if(count_2000_loop == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordUID+(count_2000_loop-1)+'-');
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

ID="319" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var ssnQualifier = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var ssnValue = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(ssnQualifier == &quot;34&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, ssnValue.substr(0,3) + &quot;-&quot; + ssnValue.substr(3,2) + &quot;-&quot;+ ssnValue.substr(5));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1444" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1445" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1443" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="320" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1448" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1449" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="321" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1450" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1451" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="323" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1455" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1454" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="325" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var qualifier = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(qualifier == 'D8')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date.substr(0,8));
}
else if (qualifier == 'RD8')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date.substr(0,8));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, date.substr(9,8));
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="1465" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1466" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="1463" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="427" N="JavaScript-recordID" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var recordIdentifierCount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifierCount&quot;);
var recordIdentifier = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;recordIdentifier&quot;);
var counter_2000 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;counter_2000&quot;);
var controlNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;controlNumber&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;=1)
{
if(counter_2000 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber+(counter_2000-1)+&quot;-&quot;);
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
}

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_1&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
for(i=0;i&lt;3;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_1&quot;, myRS, true);
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
for(i=3;i&lt;5;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr1[i-3] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_medicareDates_2&quot;, myRS1, true);

C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01&quot;);
var Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02&quot;);
var Medicare_StartDate_338 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_StartDate_338&quot;);
var Medicare_EndDate_339 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Medicare_EndDate_339&quot;);
var Supplemental_REF_F6 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Supplemental_REF_F6&quot;);
var Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted =&quot;&quot;
var Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted =&quot;&quot;
if((Supplemental_REF_F6 != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Medicare_StartDate_338 != &quot;&quot; || Medicare_EndDate_339 != &quot;&quot;))
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Supplemental_REF_F6);
if(Medicare_StartDate_338 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Medicare_StartDate_338.length == 8)
{
Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted = Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(0,4)+'-'+Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(4,2)+'-'+Medicare_StartDate_338.substr(6,2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted);
}
if(Medicare_EndDate_339 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Medicare_EndDate_339.length == 8)
{
Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted = Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(0,4)+'-'+Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(4,2)+'-'+Medicare_EndDate_339.substr(6,2)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted);
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 2)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;true&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'A')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'B')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01 == 'C')
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,Medicare_StartDate_338_formatted)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13,Medicare_EndDate_339_formatted)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;1&quot;)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;3&quot;)
}
if(Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02 == 2)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(14,&quot;2&quot;)
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2497" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2492" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2493" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2495" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="2496" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="2498" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/><CP ID="2499" FP="X" P="4" N="result5"/><CP ID="2500" FP="X" P="5" N="result6"/><CP ID="2501" FP="X" P="6" N="result7"/><CP ID="2502" FP="X" P="7" N="result8"/><CP ID="2503" FP="X" P="8" N="result9"/><CP ID="2504" FP="X" P="9" N="result10"/><CP ID="2505" FP="X" P="10" N="result11"/><CP ID="2506" FP="X" P="11" N="result12"/><CP ID="2509" FP="X" P="12" N="result13"/><CP ID="2510" FP="X" P="13" N="result14"/><CP ID="2516" FP="X" P="14" N="result15"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="591" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Medicare_PlanCode_INS06_01&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Eligibility_Reason_Code_INS06_02&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Medicare_StartDate_338&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Medicare_EndDate_339&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Supplemental_REF_F6&quot;,&quot;&quot;);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2515" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2513" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2514" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="593" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="2522" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2524" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="MedicareEligibilityReason"/><CP ID="2520" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="594" N="Plan Selection Date" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Plan Start Date
var Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348&quot;);
var Plan_EligBeginDate_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_EligBeginDate_356&quot;);
if(Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348.substr(6,2));
}
else if(Plan_EligBeginDate_356 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligBeginDate_356.length == 8)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_EligBeginDate_356.substr(6,2));
}
//Plan End Date
//Plan End Date
// Plan End Date
var Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitEndDate_349&quot;);
var Plan_EligEndDate_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_EligEndDate_357&quot;);
var endDate = &quot;&quot;; // Initialize an empty variable for the end date
if (Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6, 2);
} else if (Plan_EligEndDate_357 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Plan_EligEndDate_357.length == 8) {
endDate = Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(0, 4) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(4, 2) + '-' + Plan_EligEndDate_357.substr(6, 2);
} else {
// Default to 1/1/3000 if neither date is available
endDate = '3000-01-01';
}
// Report the end date (this will either be the formatted date or the default)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, endDate);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2576" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2577" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2574" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2575" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="595" N="JavaScript- Reset Variable" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_VariableHelper.SetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitBeginDate_348&quot;, &quot;&quot;);

var Plan_BenefitEndDate_349 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Plan_BenefitEndDate_349&quot;);
if(NM101_2310 == &quot;P3&quot;)
{
if(NM102_2310 == &quot;1&quot;)
{

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM103_2310);

{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109_2310);
}
}
else if (NM102_2310 == &quot;2&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;PCP&quot;);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(0,4)+'-'+Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(4,2)+'-'+Plan_BenefitEndDate_349.substr(6,2));
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,NM103_2310);
if(NM108_2310 == &quot;SV&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,NM109_2310);
}
}
}

N="length">10</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2716" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2715" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="636" N="JavaScript_asOfDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first line&quot;);
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
myRS.last();// Move the cursor to the last record in the recordset
var RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row of the recordset
var earliestStartDate_025=&quot;&quot;;
var earliestStartDate = &quot;&quot;;
var earliestEndDate = &quot;&quot;;
var asofdate_check = &quot;&quot;;
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;earliest date is &quot;+earliestStartDate);
// The code enters a while loop and continues as long as the value of RS1 is greater than 0.
var dtp_2000_356 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_356&quot;);
var dtp_2000_357 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_357&quot;);
var dtp_2000_303 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DTP_2000_303&quot;);
var HD01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;HD01&quot;);
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Retrieve the fields of the current row in the recordset using myRS.getFields()earliestStartDate
var currentDate = new Date(Fields[1].substr(0,4),Fields[1].substr(4,2)-1,Fields[1].substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;CurrentDate&quot;+currentDate);
if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate == &quot;&quot;)
{
earliestStartDate=currentDate;
}
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate)
{
earliestStartDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;021&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;first loop is &quot;+  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;349&quot;)
{
if(earliestEndDate == &quot;&quot;)
earliestEndDate=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestEndDate)
{
earliestEndDate = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;024&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;349&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 357 &quot;+ dtp_2000_357);
if(dtp_2000_357 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check ==&quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check=dtp_2000_357
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;second loop is &quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_357.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_357.substr(6,2));
}
}
if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] == &quot;348&quot;)
{
if(earliestStartDate_025 == &quot;&quot;)
earliestStartDate_025=currentDate;
else if(currentDate&lt;earliestStartDate_025)
{
earliestStartDate_025 = currentDate;
}
}
else if(HD01  == &quot;025&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[0] != &quot;348&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 356 &quot;+ dtp_2000_356);
if(dtp_2000_356 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check =dtp_2000_356;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,  dtp_2000_356.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_356.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_356.substr(6,2));
}
}
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestEndDate);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();// Move the cursor to the previous row in the result set
RS = myRS.getRow();// Get the current row from the result set and assign it to the RS1 variable
}
if(HD01 == &quot;001&quot;)
{
//ec_ECGlobal.println(&quot;dtp 2000 303 &quot;+ dtp_2000_303);
if(dtp_2000_303 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; asofdate_check == &quot;&quot;)
{
asofdate_check = dtp_2000_303;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop 001 is &quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+ dtp_2000_303.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+dtp_2000_303.substr(6,2));
//ec_ECGlobal.println(earliestStartDate);
}
}
if(earliestStartDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate=earliestStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestStartDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop not earliest start date&quot;);
}
if(earliestEndDate!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestEndDate=earliestEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedEarliestEndDate);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;loop not earliest end date&quot;);
}
if(earliestStartDate_025!=&quot;&quot;)
{
const formattedEarliestStartDate_025=earliestStartDate_025.toISOString().split('T')[0];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, formattedEarliestStartDate_025);
}
myRS.clear();//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, earliestStartDate.substr(0,4)+&quot;-&quot;+earliestStartDate.substr(4,2)+&quot;-&quot;+earliestStartDate.substr(6,2));
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2720" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2721" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2719" FP="X" P="0" N="asOfDate"/><CP ID="2741" FP="X" P="1" N="asOfDate_025"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="638" N="JavaScript_asOFDate_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_asOfDate&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2726" FP="A" P="0" N="DTP01"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2727" FP="A" P="1" N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2794" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="2791" FP="X" P="0" N="result3"/><CP ID="2792" FP="X" P="1" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="673" N="JavaScript_QualifierList" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var memberSupplimental_Id  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;memberSupplimental_Id&quot;);
var REF_2000_REF02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_02_0F&quot;);
var REF_1L_02  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF_1L_02&quot;);
var asOfDate = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate&quot;);
var asOfDate_025 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;asOfDate_025&quot;);
var INS03  = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;INS03&quot;);
if(REF_2000_REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;0F&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, REF_2000_REF02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{	//ec_ResultHelper.println(edieligibilityenddate);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, asOfDate);
}
}
if(REF_1L_02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;1L&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, REF_1L_02);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, asOfDate);
}
}
var array = new Array();
var value = new Array();
if(memberSupplimental_Id != &quot;&quot;)
{
array = memberSupplimental_Id.split(&quot;-&quot;);
}
for(var i=0;i&lt;array.length;i++)
{
value = array[i].split(&quot;,&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, value[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, value[1]);
if(INS03 == &quot;025&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate_025);
}
else if(INS03 != &quot;024&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, asOfDate);
if(INS03 == &quot;024&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, asOfDate);
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2829" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2830" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2817" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2818" FP="X" P="1" Map DMG03 to Gendercode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2900" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2899" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="690" N="JavaScript-Input LUI 1" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;, myRS, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2908" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2909" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2907" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="691" N="JavaScript-Input LUI 2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;, myRS1, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2911" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2912" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2910" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="692" N="JavaScript Input No Language Indicator" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);// Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array
}
// Inserting a new row into the record set
myRS2.insertRow();
myRS2.updateRow(resArr);// Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;, myRS2, true);// Setting the updated record set in the variable &quot;Pay_To_Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2916" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2917" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2915" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="693" N="JavaScript-Output_LUI" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve recordsets
var myRS  = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '7'
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang1&quot;); // contains the fields with language indicator '6'
var myRS2=  ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;lang2&quot;); // contains the fields no language indicators
var Fields = myRS.getFields();   // retrive fields of RecordSet RS
var Fields1 = myRS1.getFields(); // retrive fields of RecordSet RS1
// Checks whether identification codes are the same
if (Fields[0] == Fields1[0])
{
ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;compare&quot;);
if (Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot; || Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6 or 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields[0]);
}
}
//checks whether identification codes are different
else if	(Fields[0] != Fields1[0])
{
if(Fields[1] == &quot;7&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 7
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
if(Fields1[1] == &quot;6&quot;) // checks if language indicator is 6
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
}
else if	(Fields[1]==&quot;7&quot;) // if only language indicator 7 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields[0]);
}
else if	(Fields1[1]==&quot;6&quot;) // if only language indiactor 6 is present
{
// Report the results
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;true&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, Fields1[0]);
}
myRS2.last();                      // go to last row
var Row = myRS2.getRow();
var reportedCodes = {};            // acts like a Set
while (Row &gt; 0)
{
var Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
var code = Fields2[0];
if (
code != Fields[0] &amp;&amp;
code != Fields1[0] &amp;&amp;
!reportedCodes[code]        // block ALL duplicates
)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, &quot;LanguageDomain&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, code);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
reportedCodes[code] = true; // mark as reported
}
myRS2.previous();
Row = myRS2.getRow();
}
// clear all the recordsets
myRS.clear();
myRS1.clear();
myRS2.clear();
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="2930" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="2931" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="2918" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="2919" FP="X" P="1" the value of 2100A and 2100C using the change variabale.
2.If data is not present in 2100C back filling from 2100A</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var n3012100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N3_01_2100A&quot;);
var n3022100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N3_02_2100A&quot;);
var n4012100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N4_01_2100A&quot;);
var n4022100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N4_02_2100A&quot;);
var n4032100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N4_03_2100A&quot;);
var n4042100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N4_04_2100A&quot;);
var Member_Mail_ID_2100A = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Member_Mail_ID_2100A&quot;);
//if(isSubscriber == &quot;Y&quot;)
//{
//if(n3012100A.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; n3012100C.length &gt; 0)// &amp;&amp; (n3012100A.toUpperCase() != n3012100C.toUpperCase() || n3022100A.toUpperCase() != n3022100C.toUpperCase())
//{
if(n3012100A.length &gt; 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,n3012100A);
}
if(n3022100A.length &gt; 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,n3022100A);
}
if(n4012100A.length &gt; 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,n4012100A);
}
if(n4022100A.length &gt; 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,n4022100A);
}
if(n4032100A.length &gt; 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,n4032100A);
}
if(n4042100A.length &gt; 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,n4042100A);
}
if(Member_Mail_ID_2100A.length &gt; 0)
{

2.Spliting the values (5 to 9)and displaying in the Zip extention code.
1. /enrollment/member/correspondenceAddress/postalAddress/zipCode
2./enrollment/member/correspondenceAddress/postalAddress/zipExtensionCode</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
var n4032100A = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if(n4032100A.length &gt; 0)
{
var zip = n4032100A.substring(0,5);
var zipExtension = n4032100A.substring(5,9);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,zip);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,zipExtension);
}

var counter_2000 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;counter_2000&quot;);
var controlNumber = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;controlNumber&quot;);
if(recordIdentifierCount&gt;=1)
{
if(counter_2000 == 1)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier+controlNumber+(counter_2000-1)+&quot;-&quot;);
}
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,recordIdentifier);
